descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione En tant qu'opérateur/dans la production de variétés chez Hitachi Energy sur le site de Wettingen, vous êtes un élément central de notre production. Vous êtes responsable de la mise en place et de l'exploitation de systèmes de production pour la production de variators d'oxydes métalliques et vous assurez que nos produits répondent aux normes de qualité, de sécurité et de procédé les plus élevées. Grâce à votre expérience, vous pouvez suivre les déviations, analyser les causes et soutenir activement la stabilité et l'amélioration continue de nos processus de production. Mansioni - Mettre en place, exploiter et surveiller diverses usines de production de variators d'oxydes métalliques - Exécution attentive et soucieuse de la qualité de toutes les étapes du processus et du travail - Suivi des processus de production et détection et analyse précoces des écarts - Effectuer des contrôles de qualité et assurer la conformité des produits selon les spécifications - Documentation des valeurs de production et de procédé dans les systèmes prévus - Assurer le respect de la réglementation en matière de sécurité, de qualité et d ' environnement - Support actif pour optimiser les processus et les améliorations continues - Assurer l'ordre et la propreté dans la zone de travail conformément aux principes 5S
• Requisiti - Formation technique ou artisanale complète (mécanicien de production, automatique, opérateur d'usine, etc.) - Expérience pluriannuelle en production industrielle ou en exploitation d'installations - Bonne compréhension technique et manipulation sûre des usines de production et de transformation - Fonctionnement structuré, fiable et axé sur la qualité - Equipabilité, responsabilité et fonctionnement indépendant - Bonne connaissance de l'allemand en paroles et en écriture
• Cosa offriamo - Hitachi Energy est synonyme de technologies innovantes et de solutions énergétiques durables dans le monde entier. - Nous nous attendons à un lieu de travail sûr dans une entreprise tournée vers l'avenir, des possibilités de développement passionnantes, un environnement de travail collégial et valorisant et des avantages sociaux attrayants. Contatto - Plus sur nous

jobs.title: Product Manager Network Control – Power Applications (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity At Hitachi Energy, we're shaping the future of sustainable energy systems—and you can be at the heart of it. As Product Manager for Power Applications (EMS \/ ADMS \/ DERMS), you will own the vision, strategy, and evolution of the advanced power and network analysis applications that power our Network Control (NC) portfolio. This is a highly visible, global role where technical depth meets strategic influence, and where your ideas can directly transform how power systems are analysed and optimised in real time. You'll work across a sophisticated ecosystem of products including EMS, ADMS, DERMS and more ensuring that our power applications are aligned, scalable, and future-ready. A key focus of this role is identifying game‑changing opportunities to apply AI in power system analysis , redefining what's possible for grid operations worldwide. How you'll make an impact Define and drive the product vision, roadmap, and long-term strategy for power applications within the NC portfolio Lead the end-to-end product lifecycle, from requirements and design through testing, release, and post-launch support Shape and evolve advanced applications such as State Estimation, Power Flow (balanced & unbalanced), Security Analysis, Transient Stability, Dynamic Assessment, and Optimal Power Flow Collaborate with global R&D, Sales, Pre-sales, Marketing, and Customer Service teams to prioritize features and ensure successful delivery Identify and champion AI-driven innovations that revolutionize real-time power system analysis and optimization Monitor market trends and competitors to uncover differentiation and growth opportunities Define and track KPIs to measure product performance and customer value Support pricing strategies in partnership with Finance and assist Sales with technical expertise during pre- and post-sales engagements Engage directly with customers and partners, representing Hitachi Energy at industry conferences and events Your background Strong experience in product management, preferably within power systems, utilities, or complex software portfolios Deep understanding of power system analysis applications such as power flow, stability analysis, security analysis, and optimization Proven ability to work cross-functionally in a global, matrixed environment Strategic mindset combined with hands-on execution skills across the full product lifecycle Passion for innovation, with a strong interest in AI and advanced analytics applied to energy systems Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, including customer-facing experience Ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear product strategies and business value More about us Join us and become part of a diverse, collaborative, and purpose-driven organization where your work has real-world impact, and your ideas help shape the energy systems of tomorrow.

titleByLocale.it: Product Manager Network Control – Applicazioni di potenza (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.en: Product Manager Network Control – Power Applications (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.fr: Gestionnaire de produits Contrôle réseau – Applications d'alimentation (f/m/d)

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione L'opportunità di Hitachi Energy, stiamo plasmando il futuro dei sistemi energetici sostenibili, e si può essere al centro di esso. In qualità di Product Manager per applicazioni di potenza (EMS / ADMS / DERMS), possederai la visione, la strategia e l'evoluzione delle applicazioni avanzate di analisi della potenza e della rete che alimentano il nostro portafoglio Network Control (NC). Questo è un ruolo altamente visibile e globale in cui la profondità tecnica incontra l'influenza strategica, e dove le vostre idee possono trasformare direttamente come i sistemi di alimentazione vengono analizzati e ottimizzati in tempo reale. Potrai lavorare in un sofisticato ecosistema di prodotti, tra cui EMS, ADMS, DERMS e più garantire che le nostre applicazioni di alimentazione siano allineate, scalabili e pronte al futuro. Un focus chiave di questo ruolo è l'individuazione delle opportunità di cambiamento di gioco per applicare l'IA nell'analisi del sistema di potenza, ridefinindo ciò che è possibile per le operazioni di rete in tutto il mondo. Come farai ad avere un impatto - Definire e guidare la visione del prodotto, la roadmap e la strategia a lungo termine per le applicazioni di potenza all'interno del portafoglio NC - Condurre il ciclo di vita end-to-end del prodotto, dai requisiti e dalla progettazione attraverso test, rilascio e supporto post-lancio - Forma ed evoluzione di applicazioni avanzate come la stima dello stato, il flusso di potenza (bilanciato e sbilanciato), l'analisi di sicurezza, la stabilità transitoria, la valutazione dinamica e il flusso di potenza ottimale - Collaborare con i team di R&D, Sales, Pre-sales, Marketing e Customer Service per la priorità delle funzionalità e garantire la consegna di successo - Identificare e valorizzare le innovazioni basate su AI che rivoluzionano l'analisi e l'ottimizzazione del sistema di potenza in tempo reale - Monitorare le tendenze del mercato e i concorrenti per scoprire le opportunità di differenziazione e crescita - Definire e tracciare i KPI per misurare le prestazioni del prodotto e il valore del cliente - Sostenere le strategie di prezzi in collaborazione con Finance e assistere Vendite con competenze tecniche durante gli impegni pre- e post-vendita - Coinvolgere direttamente con clienti e partner, rappresentando Hitachi Energy in conferenze ed eventi del settore Il tuo sfondo - Una forte esperienza nella gestione dei prodotti, preferibilmente all'interno di sistemi di alimentazione, utilità o portfolio di software complessi - Profonda comprensione delle applicazioni di analisi del sistema di potenza come flusso di potenza, analisi della stabilità, analisi della sicurezza e ottimizzazione - Prove capacità di lavorare in un ambiente globale e matrice - Mindset strategico combinato con abilità di esecuzione hands-on attraverso il ciclo di vita completo del prodotto - Passione per l'innovazione, con un forte interesse per l'intelligenza artificiale e analisi avanzate applicate ai sistemi energetici - Eccellente capacità di comunicazione e gestione degli stakeholder, compresa l'esperienza di customer facecing - Capacità di tradurre concetti tecnici complessi in chiare strategie di prodotto e valore aziendale Ulteriori informazioni su di noi Unisciti a noi e diventare parte di un'organizzazione diversificata, collaborativa e orientata allo scopo in cui il tuo lavoro ha un impatto reale, e le tue idee aiutano a plasmare i sistemi energetici di domani.
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione The opportunity at Hitachi Energy, we're shaping the future of sustainable energy systems—and you can be at the heart of it. As Product Manager for Power Applications (EMS / ADMS / DERMS), you will own the vision, strategy, and evolution of the advanced power and network analysis applications that power our Network Control (NC) portfolio. This is a highly visible, global role where technical depth meets strategic influence, and where your ideas can directly transform how power systems are analysed and optimised in real time. You'll work across a sophisticated ecosystem of products including EMS, ADMS, DERMS and more ensuring that our power applications are aligned, scalable, and future-ready. A key focus of this role is identifying game-changing opportunities to apply AI in power system analysis, redefining what's possible for grid operations worldwide. ## How you'll make an impact - Define and drive the product vision, roadmap, and long-term strategy for power applications within the NC portfolio - Lead the end-to-end product lifecycle, from requirements and design through testing, release, and post-launch support - Shape and evolve advanced applications such as State Estimation, Power Flow (balanced & unbalanced), Security Analysis, Transient Stability, Dynamic Assessment, and Optimal Power Flow - Collaborate with global R&D, Sales, Pre-sales, Marketing, and Customer Service teams to prioritize features and ensure successful delivery - Identify and champion AI-driven innovations that revolutionize real-time power system analysis and optimization - Monitor market trends and competitors to uncover differentiation and growth opportunities - Define and track KPIs to measure product performance and customer value - Support pricing strategies in partnership with Finance and assist Sales with technical expertise during pre- and post-sales engagements - Engage directly with customers and partners, representing Hitachi Energy at industry conferences and events ## Your background - Strong experience in product management, preferably within power systems, utilities, or complex software portfolios - Deep understanding of power system analysis applications such as power flow, stability analysis, security analysis, and optimization - Proven ability to work cross-functionally in a global, matrixed environment - Strategic mindset combined with hands-on execution skills across the full product lifecycle - Passion for innovation, with a strong interest in AI and advanced analytics applied to energy systems - Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, including customer-facing experience - Ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear product strategies and business value ## More about us Join us and become part of a diverse, collaborative, and purpose-driven organization where your work has real-world impact, and your ideas help shape the energy systems of tomorrow.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung Die Chance bei Hitachi Energy, wir gestalten die Zukunft nachhaltiger Energiesysteme – und Sie können das Herz davon sein. Als Product Manager für Power Applications (EMS / ADMS / DERMS) besitzen Sie die Vision, Strategie und die Entwicklung der fortschrittlichen Power- und Netzwerkanalyse-Anwendungen, die unser Netzwerk Control (NC)-Portfolio antreiben. Dies ist eine sehr sichtbare, globale Rolle, in der die technische Tiefe strategischen Einfluss hat und in der Ihre Ideen direkt transformieren können, wie Energiesysteme in Echtzeit analysiert und optimiert werden. Sie arbeiten über ein hochentwickeltes Ökosystem von Produkten wie EMS, ADMS, DERMS und sorgen dafür, dass unsere Power-Anwendungen ausgerichtet, skalierbar und zukunftsbereit sind. Ein wesentlicher Schwerpunkt dieser Rolle ist die Identifizierung von Spielwechselmöglichkeiten zur Anwendung von KI in der Power-System-Analyse, die Neudefinition der Möglichkeiten für Netzoperationen weltweit. Wie Sie einen Einfluss haben - Produktvision, Roadmap und langfristige Strategie für Stromanwendungen im NC-Portfolio definieren und vorantreiben - Führen Sie den End-to-End-Produktlebenszyklus, von
• Anforderungen und Design über Test-, Release- und Post-Launch-Unterstützung - Gestalten und entwickeln fortschrittliche Anwendungen wie Staatsschätzung, Stromfluss (ausgeglichen & unausgeglichen), Sicherheitsanalyse, Transiente Stabilität, Dynamische Bewertung und Optimaler Stromfluss - Zusammenarbeit mit globalen R&D-, Vertriebs-, Pre-sale-, Marketing- und Customer Service-Teams, um Funktionen zu priorisieren und eine erfolgreiche Lieferung zu gewährleisten - Identifizieren und Champion KI-getriebene Innovationen, die Echtzeit-Power-Systemanalyse und Optimierung revolutionieren - Überwachen Sie Markttrends und Wettbewerber, um Differenzierungs- und Wachstumsmöglichkeiten aufzudecken - Kennzahlen definieren und verfolgen, um Produktleistung und Kundenwert zu messen - Fördern Sie Preisstrategien in Partnerschaft mit Finanzen und unterstützen Sie den Vertrieb mit technischem Know-how bei Vor- und Nachverkaufsengagements - Direkt mit Kunden und Partnern, die Hitachi Energy auf Branchenkonferenzen und Events vertreten Ihr Hintergrund - Starke Erfahrung im Produktmanagement, bevorzugt innerhalb von Stromsystemen, Versorgungsunternehmen oder komplexen Software-Portfolios - Tiefes Verständnis von Leistungssystemanalyseanwendungen wie Stromfluss, Stabilitätsanalyse, Sicherheitsanalyse und Optimierung - Bewiesene Fähigkeit, funktionsübergreifend in einer globalen, Matrix-Umgebung zu arbeiten - Strategische Denkweise kombiniert mit praktischen Ausführungskompetenzen über den gesamten Produktlebenszyklus - Innovationspassion mit einem starken Interesse an KI und fortschrittlicher Analytik für Energiesysteme - Ausgezeichnete Kommunikations- und Stakeholder-Management-Fähigkeiten, einschließlich Kundenerfahrung - Fähigkeit, komplexe technische Konzepte in klare Produktstrategien und Geschäftswert zu übersetzen Mehr über uns Begleiten Sie uns und werden Sie Teil einer vielfältigen, kollaborativen und zielorientierten Organisation, in der Ihre Arbeit Auswirkungen auf die Welt hat, und Ihre Ideen helfen, die Energiesysteme von morgen zu gestalten.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione L'opportunité chez Hitachi Energy, nous façonnons l'avenir des systèmes énergétiques durables – et vous pouvez en être au cœur. En tant que Product Manager for Power Applications (EMS / ADMS / DERMS), vous posséderez la vision, la stratégie et l'évolution des applications avancées d'analyse de puissance et de réseau qui alimentent notre portefeuille de contrôle réseau (NC). C'est un rôle mondial très visible où la profondeur technique rencontre une influence stratégique et où vos idées peuvent directement transformer la façon dont les systèmes d'alimentation sont analysés et optimisés en temps réel. Vous travaillerez à travers un écosystème sophistiqué de produits dont EMS, ADMS, DERMS et vous assurerez que nos applications de puissance sont alignées, évolutives et prêtes à l'avenir. L'un des principaux objectifs de ce rôle est d'identifier les possibilités de changement de jeu pour appliquer l'IA dans l'analyse des systèmes d'alimentation électrique, en redéfinissant ce qui est possible pour les opérations du réseau mondial. Comment vous ferez un impact - Définir et piloter la vision du produit, la feuille de route et la stratégie à long terme pour les applications de puissance dans le portefeuille NC - Diriger le cycle de vie des produits de bout en bout, depuis les exigences et la conception jusqu'à la mise à l'essai, à la libération et après le lancement - Former et développer des applications avancées telles que l'estimation de l'état, le flux de puissance (équilibré et déséquilibré), l'analyse de sécurité, la stabilité transitoire, l'évaluation dynamique et le flux de puissance optimal - Collaborer avec les équipes mondiales de R-D, de ventes, de préventes, de marketing et de service à la clientèle afin de prioriser les caractéristiques et d'assurer une livraison réussie - Identifier et promouvoir des innovations pilotées par l'IA qui révolutionnent l'analyse et l'optimisation du système d'alimentation en temps réel - Suivre les tendances du marché et les concurrents pour découvrir les possibilités de différenciation et de croissance - Définir et suivre les KPI pour mesurer la performance du produit et la valeur client - Soutenir les stratégies de tarification en partenariat avec Finance et aider les ventes à acquérir une expertise technique lors des engagements avant et après la vente - Participer directement avec les clients et les partenaires, représentant Hitachi Energy lors de conférences et d'événements Vos antécédents - Forte expérience de la gestion des produits, de préférence dans les systèmes d'alimentation, les services publics ou les portefeuilles de logiciels complexes - Compréhension approfondie des applications d'analyse de système d'alimentation telles que le débit d'alimentation, l'analyse de stabilité, l'analyse de sécurité et l'optimisation - Capacité éprouvée de travailler interfonctionnellement dans un environnement global et matriciel - L'état d'esprit stratégique combiné avec des compétences pratiques d'exécution tout au long du cycle de vie du produit - Passion d'innovation, avec un fort intérêt pour l'IA et l'analyse avancée appliquée aux systèmes énergétiques - Excellentes compétences en communication et gestion des parties prenantes, y compris l'expérience client - Capacité de traduire des concepts techniques complexes en stratégies de produits claires et en valeur opérationnelle Plus sur nous Rejoignez-nous et devenez membre d'une organisation diversifiée, collaborative et ciblée où votre travail a un impact réel, et vos idées aident à façonner les systèmes énergétiques de demain.

jobs.title: System Engineer (SCADA/RTU) for Substation Automation 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity To strengthen our engineering team, we are looking for a System Engineer (SCADA\/RTU) to work on control and protection systems in the field of power grid substations. Openness, customer orientation, and innovation are key success factors in our working environment. You should be a team player who collaborates across different organizational levels in an intercultural environment. If you enjoy combining technical expertise with a strong customer focus, this is an opportunity for you! Early-career professionals are also welcome to apply. Welcome to our team! How you'll make an impact In this challenging position, you will design sub-station control systems (SCADA) for high- and medium-voltage switchgear in accordance with the latest technology standards such as IEC 61850, IEC 104, and other protocols You will integrate the systems, including the parameterization of the Ethernet-based communication structure Furthermore, you will implement project-specific functions and software applications, carry out tests, and coordinate interfaces Supporting on-site commissioning at facilities throughout Switzerland is also part of your role You will support the project manager in technical matters and coordinate both customers and in-ternal partners You will create operating manuals tailored to customer requirements Your background Bachelor's or master's degree in power engineering, electrical engineering, or an equivalent qualification Basic knowledge of control and protection systems, RTU systems, or process automation systems is an advantage You have basic knowledge of cybersecurity and network architecture Alongside strong communication skills and team spirit, you must demonstrate the ability to work independently and take responsibility Fluent German (spoken and written) is required. Good English skills are essential; additional languages such as French are an advantage More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it: L'opportunità Per rafforzare il nostro team di ingegneri, stiamo cercando un System Engineer (SCADA\/RTU) per lavorare sui sistemi di controllo e protezione nel campo delle sottostazioni di rete elettrica. L'apertura, l'orientamento del cliente e l'innovazione sono fattori chiave di successo nel nostro ambiente di lavoro. Dovresti essere un giocatore di squadra che collabora a diversi livelli organizzativi in un ambiente interculturale. Se ti piace combinare competenze tecniche con un forte focus del cliente, questa è un'opportunità per te! I professionisti della cura precoce sono anche benvenuti da applicare. Benvenuti nella nostra squadra! Come farai ad avere un impatto In questa posizione impegnativa, si progettano sistemi di controllo sottostazione (SCADA) per switchgear ad alta e media tensione in conformità con gli ultimi standard tecnologici come IEC 61850, IEC 104 e altri protocolli Integrerai i sistemi, inclusa la parametrizzazione della struttura di comunicazione basata su Ethernet Inoltre, implementerai funzioni e applicazioni software specifiche per il progetto, eseguirai test e coordinate interfacce Supportando la messa in loco presso strutture in tutta la Svizzera è anche parte del tuo ruolo Supporterai il project manager in materia tecnica e coordinate sia i clienti che i partner esterni Potrai creare manuali operativi su misura per le esigenze del cliente Corso di laurea o master in ingegneria elettrica, ingegneria elettrica, o una qualifica equivalente Conoscenze di base di sistemi di controllo e protezione, sistemi RTU, o sistemi di automazione di processo è un vantaggio Hai conoscenze di base di sicurezza informatica e architettura di rete Accanto a forti capacità di comunicazione e spirito di squadra, è necessario dimostrare la capacità di lavorare in modo indipendente e prendere la responsabilità Fluent tedesco (spoken e scritto) è richiesto. Le buone competenze in inglese sono essenziali; lingue aggiuntive come il francese sono un vantaggio Maggiori informazioni su di noi Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali, creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere.

Openness, customer orientation, and innovation are key success factors in our working environment. You should be a team player who collaborates across different organizational levels in an intercultural environment. If you enjoy combining technical expertise with a strong customer focus, this is an opportunity for you! Early-career professionals are also welcome to apply. Welcome to our team! How you'll make an impact In this challenging position, you will design sub-station control systems (SCADA) for high- and medium-voltage switchgear in accordance with the latest technology standards such as IEC 61850, IEC 104, and other protocols You will integrate the systems, including the parameterization of the Ethernet-based communication structure Furthermore, you will implement project-specific functions and software applications, carry out tests, and coordinate interfaces Supporting on-site commissioning at facilities throughout Switzerland is also part of your role You will support the project manager in technical matters and coordinate both customers and in-ternal partners You will create operating manuals tailored to customer requirements Your background Bachelor's or master's degree in power engineering, electrical engineering, or an equivalent qualification Basic knowledge of control and protection systems, RTU systems, or process automation systems is an advantage You have basic knowledge of cybersecurity and network architecture Alongside strong communication skills and team spirit, you must demonstrate the ability to work independently and take responsibility Fluent German (spoken and written) is required. Good English skills are essential; additional languages such as French are an advantage More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de: Die Gelegenheit Um unser Engineering-Team zu stärken, suchen wir einen System Engineer (SCADA\/RTU) zur Arbeit an Steuerungs- und Schutzsystemen im Bereich der Netzunterstationen. Offenheit, Kundenorientierung und Innovation sind wichtige Erfolgsfaktoren in unserem Arbeitsumfeld. Sie sollten ein Teamplayer sein, der in einer interkulturellen Umgebung auf unterschiedlichen organisatorischen Ebenen zusammenarbeitet. Wenn Sie technisches Know-how mit einem starken Kundenfokus kombinieren möchten, ist dies eine Gelegenheit für Sie! Auch Nachwuchsprofis sind willkommen zu bewerben. Willkommen in unserem Team! Wie Sie einen Einfluss haben In dieser herausfordernden Position entwerfen Sie Unterstationen-Steuersysteme (SCADA) für Hoch- und Mittelspannungs-Schaltanlagen gemäß den neuesten Technologiestandards wie IEC 61850, IEC 104 und anderen Protokollen Sie integrieren die Systeme, einschließlich der Parametrierung der Ethernet-basierten Kommunikationsstruktur Darüber hinaus werden Sie projektspezifische Funktionen und Software-Anwendungen implementieren, Tests durchführen und Koordinatenschnittstellen Die Unterstützung vor Ort Inbetriebnahme an Einrichtungen in der ganzen Schweiz ist auch Teil Ihrer Rolle Sie werden den Projektmanager in technischen Angelegenheiten unterstützen und sowohl Kunden als auch in-terne Partner koordinieren Sie erstellen Bedienungsanleitungen, die auf die Kundenanforderungen zugeschnitten sind Ihr Hintergrund Bachelor- oder Master-Abschluss in Stromtechnik, Elektrotechnik oder eine gleichwertige Qualifikation Grundlegende Kenntnisse in Steuerungs- und Schutzsystemen, RTU-Systemen oder Prozessautomatisierungssystemen ist ein Vorteil Sie haben Grundkenntnisse in der Cybersicherheit und Netzwerkarchitektur Neben starken Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und Teamgeist müssen Sie die Fähigkeit, unabhängig zu arbeiten und Verantwortung übernehmen. Gute Englischkenntnisse sind essentiell; zusätzliche Sprachen wie Französisch sind ein Vorteil Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistung zu optimieren, während Sie eine Umgebung schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.
descriptionByLocale.fr: L'opportunité Pour renforcer notre équipe d'ingénieurs, nous cherchons un ingénieur système (SCADA\/RTU) pour travailler sur les systèmes de contrôle et de protection dans le domaine des sous-stations du réseau électrique. L'ouverture, l'orientation des clients et l'innovation sont des facteurs clés de succès dans notre environnement de travail. Vous devriez être un joueur d'équipe qui collabore à différents niveaux organisationnels dans un environnement interculturel. Si vous aimez combiner l'expertise technique avec une forte concentration client, c'est une opportunité pour vous! Les professionnels en début de carrière sont également invités à postuler. Bienvenue dans notre équipe ! Comment vous ferez un impact Dans cette position difficile, vous concevrez des systèmes de commande sous-station (SCADA) pour les commutateurs à haute et moyenne tension conformément aux dernières normes technologiques telles que IEC 61850, IEC 104 et d'autres protocoles Vous intégrerez les systèmes, y compris la paramétrisation de la structure de communication Ethernet De plus, vous mettrez en œuvre des fonctions spécifiques au projet et des applications logicielles, réaliserez des tests et coordonnerz des interfaces.L'accompagnement de la mise en service sur place dans toute la Suisse fait également partie de votre rôle. Vous créerez des manuels d'exploitation adaptés aux besoins du client Votre formation Baccalauréat ou maîtrise en ingénierie de l'énergie, génie électrique ou une qualification équivalente Connaissance de base des systèmes de contrôle et de protection, des systèmes RTU, ou des systèmes d'automatisation de processus est un avantage Vous avez une connaissance de base de la cybersécurité et de l'architecture de réseau Outre de solides compétences en communication et l'esprit d'équipe, vous devez démontrer la capacité de travailler en toute indépendance et prendre des responsabilités. De bonnes compétences en anglais sont essentielles; d'autres langues comme le français sont un avantage Plus sur nous Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir.

jobs.title: Technical Project Manager 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity We are looking for a Project Manager to strengthen our Team in our Business Unit Transformers, Ticino. In this role you are leading the execution of medium-size projects mainly related to LV & MV Transformers and Reactors and ensure that all related activities are performed in accordance with Hitachi Energy policy, quality standards, health & safety and environment requirements. Our flexible work practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow. Please submit your resume in English. How you'll make an impact Developing project schedules, and determining resource requirements Monitoring and reporting on the status of projects including cost, timing, and staffing Ensuring adherence to internal and external quality standards (e.g., International Standards Organization) Manage After-Sales projects by ensuring the fulfillment of customer needs Identifying\/resolving obstacles to completing project on time and to budget May include work managing multiple, interrelated projects (including business transformation projects) On some projects, the work may include integrating vendor tasks into the project plan and tracking and reviewing vendor deliverables Your background Electrical Engineering or mechanical Engineering Background 2-3 years proven experience in Project Management with focus on Transformers and Reactors Collaboration with diverse number of stakeholders Very good knowledge of English and Italian; any other languages are a plus Strong communicator, self-driven and open-minded Structured and organized person with the ability to work under time pressure Team-player able to build and motivate a project team More about us   Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it: L'opportunità Siamo alla ricerca di un Project Manager per rafforzare il nostro Team nel nostro Business Unit Transformers, Ticino. In questo ruolo si sta conducendo l'esecuzione di progetti di medie dimensioni principalmente relativi a trasformatori e reattori LV & MV e garantire che tutte le attività correlate siano svolte in conformità con la politica di Hitachi Energy, standard di qualità, requisiti di salute e sicurezza e ambiente. Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere. Invia il tuo curriculum in inglese. Come farai ad avere un impatto - Sviluppare programmi di progetto e determinare i requisiti delle risorse - Monitoraggio e reporting sullo stato dei progetti, compresi i costi, i tempi e il personale - Garantire l'aderenza agli standard di qualità interni ed esterni (ad esempio, International Standards Organization) - Gestire i progetti After-Sales assicurando la soddisfazione delle esigenze del cliente - Identificare/risolvere ostacoli al completamento del progetto nel tempo e al bilancio - Può includere la gestione del lavoro di più, progetti correlati (compresi i progetti di trasformazione aziendale) - Su alcuni progetti, il lavoro può includere l'integrazione delle attività dei fornitori nel piano di progetto e il monitoraggio e la revisione dei responsabili dei fornitori Il tuo sfondo - Ingegneria elettrica o ingegneria meccanica - 2-3 anni di esperienza dimostrata in Project Management con focus su Trasformatori e Reattori - Collaborazione con un numero diversificato di stakeholder - Ottima conoscenza dell'inglese e dell'italiano; tutte le altre lingue sono un plus - Forte comunicatore, autoguidato e aperto - Persona strutturata e organizzata con la capacità di lavorare sotto pressione del tempo - Team-player in grado di costruire e motivare un team di progetto Ulteriori informazioni su di noi Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere.
descriptionByLocale.en: ## The opportunity We are looking for a Project Manager to strengthen our Team in our Business Unit Transformers, Ticino. In this role you are leading the execution of medium-size projects mainly related to LV & MV Transformers and Reactors and ensure that all related activities are performed in accordance with Hitachi Energy policy, quality standards, health & safety and environment requirements. Our flexible work practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow. Please submit your resume in English. ## How you'll make an impact - Developing project schedules, and determining resource requirements - Monitoring and reporting on the status of projects including cost, timing, and staffing - Ensuring adherence to internal and external quality standards (e.g., International Standards Organization) - Manage After-Sales projects by ensuring the fulfillment of customer needs - Identifying/resolving obstacles to completing project on time and to budget - May include work managing multiple, interrelated projects (including business transformation projects) - On some projects, the work may include integrating vendor tasks into the project plan and tracking and reviewing vendor deliverables ## Your background - Electrical Engineering or mechanical Engineering Background - 2-3 years proven experience in Project Management with focus on Transformers and Reactors - Collaboration with diverse number of stakeholders - Very good knowledge of English and Italian; any other languages are a plus - Strong communicator, self-driven and open-minded - Structured and organized person with the ability to work under time pressure - Team-player able to build and motivate a project team ## More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Die Gelegenheit Wir suchen einen Projektmanager, um unser Team in unserem Business Unit Transformers, Ticino, zu stärken. In dieser Rolle führen Sie die Durchführung von mittelständischen Projekten vor allem im Zusammenhang mit LV & MV Transformers und Reactors und stellen sicher, dass alle damit verbundenen Aktivitäten in Übereinstimmung mit Hitachi Energiepolitik, Qualitätsstandards, Gesundheit und Sicherheit und Umweltanforderungen durchgeführt werden. Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen dabei, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistungsfähigkeit zu optimieren und eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können. Bitte geben Sie Ihren Lebenslauf auf Englisch ein. Wie Sie einen Einfluss haben - Entwicklung der Projektpläne und Bestimmung der Ressourcenanforderungen - Überwachung und Berichterstattung über den Status von Projekten, einschließlich Kosten, Zeitpunkt und Personal - Sicherstellung der Einhaltung interner und externer Qualitätsstandards (z.B. International Standards Organization) - Verwalten von After-Sales-Projekten durch die Sicherstellung der Erfüllung der Kundenbedürfnisse - Ermittlung/Resolvierung von Hindernissen für den Abschluss des Projekts auf Zeit und auf Budget - Kann die Arbeit umfassen, die mehrere, miteinander verbundene Projekte verwaltet (einschließlich Business Transformation Projekte) - Bei einigen Projekten kann die Arbeit die Integration von Vendor-
• Aufgaben in den Projektplan und das Tracking und die Überprüfung von Vendor-Lieferanten beinhalten Ihr Hintergrund - Elektrotechnik oder Maschinenbau Hintergrund - 2-3 Jahre Erfahrung im Projektmanagement mit Fokus auf Transformers und Reactors - Zusammenarbeit mit verschiedenen Interessengruppen - Sehr gute Englischkenntnisse und Italienisch; alle anderen Sprachen sind ein Plus - Starker Kommunikator, selbstfahrend und offengesinnt - Strukturierte und organisierte Person mit der Fähigkeit, unter Zeitdruck zu arbeiten - Teamplayer können ein Projektteam aufbauen und motivieren Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen dabei, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistungsfähigkeit zu optimieren und eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.
descriptionByLocale.fr: L'opportunité Nous sommes à la recherche d'un gestionnaire de projet pour renforcer notre équipe dans notre unité de transformation, Tessin. Dans ce rôle, vous dirigez l'exécution de projets de taille moyenne principalement liés à LV & MV Transformateurs et Réacteurs et vous assurez que toutes les activités connexes sont réalisées conformément à la politique Hitachi Energy, aux normes de qualité, à la santé et à la sécurité et aux exigences environnementales. Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir. Veuillez soumettre votre curriculum vitae en anglais. Comment vous ferez un impact - Élaborer des calendriers de projets et déterminer les besoins en ressources - Suivi et établissement de rapports sur l'état d'avancement des projets, y compris les coûts, le calendrier et les effectifs - Respect des normes de qualité internes et externes (par exemple, Organisation internationale de normalisation) - Gérer les projets après-vente en assurant la satisfaction des besoins des clients - Recenser et résoudre les obstacles à l'achèvement du projet dans les délais et au budget - Peut comprendre des travaux de gestion de projets multiples et interdépendants (y compris des projets de transformation des activités) - Pour certains projets, les travaux peuvent comprendre l'intégration des tâches des fournisseurs dans le plan du projet et le suivi et l'examen des produits livrables des fournisseurs. Vos antécédents - Génie électrique ou mécanique Contexte - 2-3 ans d'expérience dans la gestion de projet avec l'accent sur les transformateurs et les réacteurs - Collaboration avec divers acteurs - Très bonne connaissance de l'anglais et de l'italien; toutes les autres langues sont un plus - Communicateur fort, autonome et ouvert d'esprit - Personne structurée et organisée ayant la capacité de travailler sous pression temporelle - Joueur d'équipe capable de construire et de motiver une équipe de projet Plus sur nous Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et professionnelle tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir.

jobs.title: Global Product Specialist - Dry type transformers (mainstream)
jobs.description: The opportunity Hitachi Energy is looking for a Global Product Specialist for mainstream business of Dry-type transformers to join our innovative team in any of these locations: Raleigh\/USA, Bland\/USA, Savli\/India, Vadodara\/India, Cheonan\/South Korea, Zaragoza\/Spain, Shanghai\/China. In this role, you will play a key part in supporting the global product manager in managing the dry-type transformer product portfolio, conducting comprehensive market\/segment technical analysis, and supporting the development of cutting-edge products. This position not only provides a chance to expand your skills and knowledge in the energy industry but also offers the opportunity to contribute to transformative solutions that promote sustainability and advance your career in a rapidly evolving market. How you will make an impact Conduct comprehensive market\/segment technical analysis to identify trends and assess their impact on the transformer portfolio. Evaluate technical requirements and perform competitive assessments to pinpoint product gaps and improvement opportunities. Manage and update technical specifications for existing products to ensure market competitiveness and value. Oversee performance improvement initiatives through benchmarking and quality feedback on dry type transformers. Ensure compliance with international regulations and industry standards throughout the product lifecycle. Support new product development by translating market requirements into actionable inputs for the product roadmap and technical requirement specifications. Prepare and present technical communication materials to support product launches and enhance market positioning. Develop and deliver engaging training sessions to empower cross-functional teams with the latest product knowledge and market insights. Living Hitachi Energy's core values of safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business. Responsible to ensure compliance with applicable external and internal regulations, procedures, and guidelines. Your background Degree in Electrical\/Mechanical Engineering. Minimum of 7 years of experience in R&D, product\/technology development or engineering in dry type transformers, or a similar role within the transformers or energy industry. Strong technical understanding of dry type transformers, energy solutions and industry technologies to effectively communicate product benefits and differentiate offerings. Proven ability to conduct market analysis and competitive assessments to drive product developments. Excellent communication and presentation skills for both technical and non-technical audiences. Ability to work collaboratively across cross-functional teams and manage multiple projects simultaneously. Fluent English

titleByLocale.it: Global Product Specialista - Dry type transformers (mainstream)
titleByLocale.en: Global Product Specialist - Dry type transformers (mainstream)
titleByLocale.de: Global Product Spezialist - Dry type transformers (mainstream)
titleByLocale.fr: Global Product Spécialiste - Dry type transformers (mainstream)

descriptionByLocale.it: The opportunity Hitachi Energy is looking for a Global Product Specialist for mainstream business of Dry-type transformers to join our innovative team in any of these locations: Raleigh\/USA, Bland\/USA, Savli\/India, Vadodara\/India, Cheonan\/South Korea, Zaragoza\/Spain, Shanghai\/China. In this role, you will play a key part in supporting the global product manager in managing the dry-type transformer product portfolio, conducting comprehensive market\/segment technical analysis, and supporting the development of cutting-edge products. This position not only provides a chance to expand your skills and knowledge in the energy industry but also offers the opportunity to contribute to transformative solutions that promote sustainability and advance your career in a rapidly evolving market. How you will make an impact Conduct comprehensive market\/segment technical analysis to identify trends and assess their impact on the transformer portfolio. Evaluate technical requirements and perform competitive assessments to pinpoint product gaps and improvement opportunities. Manage and update technical specifications for existing products to ensure market competitiveness and value. Oversee performance improvement initiatives through benchmarking and quality feedback on dry type transformers. Ensure compliance with international regulations and industry standards throughout the product lifecycle. Support new product development by translating market requirements into actionable inputs for the product roadmap and technical requirement specifications. Prepare and present technical communication materials to support product launches and enhance market positioning. Develop and deliver engaging training sessions to empower cross-functional teams with the latest product knowledge and market insights. Living Hitachi Energy's core values of safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business. Responsible to ensure compliance with applicable external and internal regulations, procedures, and guidelines. Your background Degree in Electrical\/Mechanical Engineering. Minimum of 7 years of experience in R&D, product\/technology development or engineering in dry type transformers, or a similar role within the transformers or energy industry. Strong technical understanding of dry type transformers, energy solutions and industry technologies to effectively communicate product benefits and differentiate offerings. Proven ability to conduct market analysis and competitive assessments to drive product developments. Excellent communication and presentation skills for both technical and non-technical audiences. Ability to work collaboratively across cross-functional teams and manage multiple projects simultaneously. Fluent English

jobs.title: Assembler 80 - 100% (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Position In dieser spannenden Position als Assembler hast du die Chance, aktiv an der Montage von Hochspannungsdurchführungen mitzuwirken und dabei höchste Qualitätsstandards umzusetzen. Du arbeitest selbstständig nach technischen Unterlagen und trägst durch deine präzise und zuverlässige Arbeitsweise zur termingerechten Fertigung komplexer Baugruppen bei. Deine Erfahrung in der Maschinenmontage sowie dein Verantwortungsbewusstsein machen dich zu einem wichtigen Teil eines engagierten Teams. Nutz die Möglichkeit, in einem flexiblen Arbeitsumfeld deine Fähigkeiten weiterzuentwickeln und gemeinsam mit uns zu wachsen. Unsere lokale Produktgruppe Insulation & Components ist technischer Marktführer in der Auslegung und Herstellung von Transformatoren-Durchführungen. Zu den Kunden zählen namhafte, internationale Unternehmen der Elektroindustrie, die sich mit Stromerzeugung, Stromübertragung und Stromverteilung befassen. Unsere Hochspannungs-Durchführungen nehmen weltweit eine Spitzenposition ein.  Das kannst du bewirken   Durchführung der Montage von Hochspannungsdurchführungen gemäss den in den Qualitätssiche­rungsverfahren und Arbeitsanweisungen festgehaltenen Vorgaben und Zielsetzungen  Arbeiten nach Arbeits­papieren wie Kundenaufträge, technischen Unterlagen, Checkliste und Arbeits­plan Melden von Fehlern, Unstimmigkeiten an direkten Vorgesetzten Termingerechte und wirtschaftliche Montage der Baugruppen und Schaltersysteme Einhaltung der festgehaltenen QS-Richtlinien Schwachstellen erkennen, richtig stellen und an Vorgesetzten melden Einhaltung des Ablaufes für Fehlerbehebung Das bringst du mit Abgeschlossene Berufslehre als Polymechaniker o.ä. Praktische und theoretische Erfahrung in der Maschinenmontage Gute Kenntnisse im Lesen von Zeichnungsunterlagen und Arbeitspapieren Verantwortungs- und qualitätsbewusste Persönlichkeit Flexibilität, Ausdauer sowie Zielstrebigkeit runden Ihr Profil ab Bereitschaft zu 3-Schichtbetrieb Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen dir, deine persönlichen und beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.

descriptionByLocale.it: In questa posizione emozionante come assemblatore, si ha la possibilità di partecipare attivamente all'assemblaggio di boccole ad alta tensione e di implementare i più elevati standard di qualità. Lavorate in modo indipendente secondo i documenti tecnici e contribuite alla produzione tempestiva di assemblaggi complessi attraverso il vostro funzionamento preciso e affidabile. La tua esperienza nell'assemblaggio di macchine e il tuo senso di responsabilità ti rendono una parte importante di un team dedicato. Utilizzare l'opportunità di sviluppare e crescere le vostre competenze in un ambiente di lavoro flessibile. Il nostro gruppo di prodotti Insulation & Components è un leader tecnico nella progettazione e produzione di trasformatori. I clienti includono aziende internazionali ben note nel settore elettrico che si occupano di produzione di elettricità, trasmissione di energia e distribuzione di energia. Le nostre boccole ad alta tensione assumono una posizione ottimale in tutto il mondo. Questo consente di sviluppare l'assemblaggio di boccole ad alta tensione in base ai requisiti e agli obiettivi stabiliti nelle procedure di garanzia della qualità e istruzioni di lavoro per ottimizzare il lavoro in base a documenti di lavoro quali ordini del cliente, documenti tecnici, checklist e piano di lavoro Errori di segnalazione, incongruenze ai supervisori diretti e assemblaggio economico delle assemblee e sistemi di commutazione.
descriptionByLocale.en: In this exciting position as an assembler, you have the chance to actively participate in the assembly of high-voltage bushings and to implement the highest quality standards. You work independently according to technical documents and contribute to the timely production of complex assemblies through your precise and reliable operation. Your experience in machine assembly and your sense of responsibility make you an important part of a dedicated team. Use the opportunity to develop and grow your skills in a flexible working environment. Our local Insulation & Components product group is a technical leader in the design and manufacture of transformers. Customers include well-known, international companies in the electrical industry that deal with electricity generation, power transmission and power distribution. Our high-voltage bushings take a top position worldwide. This allows you to develop the assembly of high-voltage bushings according to the requirements and objectives set out in the quality assurance procedures and work instructions to optimize work according to work documents such as customer orders, technical documents, checklist and work plan Reporting errors, inconsistencies to direct supervisors and economic assembly of the assemblies and switch systems Compliance with the established QS guidelines.

descriptionByLocale.fr: Dans cette position passionnante en tant qu'assembleur, vous avez la chance de participer activement à l'assemblage des douilles haute tension et de mettre en œuvre les normes de qualité les plus élevées. Vous travaillez indépendamment selon les documents techniques et contribuez à la production en temps opportun d'assemblages complexes grâce à votre fonctionnement précis et fiable. Votre expérience dans l'assemblage de machines et votre sens des responsabilités font de vous une partie importante d'une équipe dévouée. Profitez de l'occasion pour développer et développer vos compétences dans un environnement de travail flexible. Notre groupe de produits Isolation & Composants local est un leader technique dans la conception et la fabrication de transformateurs. Les clients comprennent des entreprises internationales bien connues de l'industrie électrique qui s'occupent de la production d'électricité, du transport d'électricité et de la distribution d'électricité. Nos douilles haute tension occupent une position de choix dans le monde entier. Cela vous permet de développer l'assemblage de douilles haute tension selon les exigences et les objectifs définis dans les procédures d'assurance qualité et les instructions de travail pour optimiser le travail selon les documents de travail tels que les commandes des clients, les documents techniques, la liste de contrôle et le plan de travail Signaler les erreurs, les incohérences aux superviseurs directs et l'assemblage économique des assemblages et des systèmes de commutation Conformité avec les lignes directrices QS établies.

jobs.title: Project Management Officer - Gas Insulated Switchgear 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity In this role, you will report to the Department Manager of Project Management and support a growing global team of more than 70 Project Managers globally. You will play a key role in strengthening project execution excellence for our Gas Insulated Switchgear (GIS) customer projects by shaping robust processes, governance, and continuous improvement initiatives across a diverse project portfolio. This position offers a unique opportunity to combine strategic process ownership, portfolio governance, and continuous improvement leadership in an international project environment. How you'll make an impact Develop, implement, and continuously improve project management processes, standards, and governance across a global project portfolio Strengthen process and portfolio competence to ensure transparency and on‑time delivery (OTD) of customer projects Translate lessons learned from project execution into structured continuous improvement (CI) actions Lead and support mid‑term strategic project management initiatives in close cross‑functional collaboration Act as an escalation point for systemic project management issues and drive sustainable resolutions Ensure project management methods, tools, and IT systems are fit for purpose and continuously optimized Leverage data analytics to support data‑driven decision‑making and identify improvement opportunities Actively contribute to and collaborate within the CI community, fostering a learning and improvement culture Your background 5+ years of experience in project management within complex, international project environments Strong expertise in project management processes, governance, and portfolio management Project Management Professional (PMP) certification Lean Six Sigma Green Belt or Black Belt with a strong continuous improvement mindset Experience in business analysis and applying Lean concepts in a technology-driven environment Proven leadership, stakeholder management, and communication skills Experience managing external partners and contract resources Active member of a CI community, with a collaborative and knowledge-sharing mindset More about us   Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

titleByLocale.it: Project Management Officer - Interruttore isolato a gas 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.en: Project Management Officer - Gas Insulated Switchgear 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.fr: Agent de gestion de projet - Interrupteur isotherme à gaz 80 – 100% (f/m/d)

descriptionByLocale.it: L'opportunità In questo ruolo, si riferirà al Direttore del Dipartimento di Project Management e sostenere un team globale in crescita di oltre 70 Project Manager a livello globale. Si svolgerà un ruolo chiave nel rafforzare l'eccellenza dell'esecuzione del progetto per i nostri progetti clienti Gas Insulated Switchgear (GIS) plasmando processi robusti, governance e iniziative di miglioramento continuo in un portafoglio di progetti diversificato. Questa posizione offre un'opportunità unica per combinare la proprietà strategica del processo, la governance del portafoglio e la leadership di miglioramento continuo in un ambiente di progetto internazionale. Come farai ad avere un impatto - Sviluppare, implementare e migliorare continuamente i processi di gestione dei progetti, gli standard e la governance in un portafoglio di progetti globale - Rafforzare la competenza del processo e del portafoglio per garantire trasparenza e consegna on-time (OTD) dei progetti dei clienti - Tradurre lezioni apprese dall'esecuzione del progetto in azioni di miglioramento continuo strutturato (CI) - Guidare e sostenere iniziative strategiche di gestione del progetto a medio termine in stretta collaborazione interfunzionale - Agire come punto di escalation per le questioni di gestione dei progetti sistemici e guidare risoluzioni sostenibili - Assicurare i metodi di gestione del progetto, gli strumenti e i sistemi IT sono adatti a scopo e continuamente ottimizzati - Leva l'analisi dei dati per supportare il processo decisionale basato sui dati e identificare le opportunità di miglioramento - Contribuire attivamente e collaborare all'interno della comunità CI, promuovendo una cultura di apprendimento e miglioramento Il tuo sfondo - 5+ anni di esperienza nella gestione dei progetti in ambienti di progetto complessi e internazionali - Forte competenza nei processi di gestione del progetto, governance e gestione del portafoglio - certificazione Project Management Professional (PMP) - Cintura verde Lean Six Sigma o Cintura nera con un forte miglioramento continuo - Esperienza nell'analisi aziendale e applicazione dei concetti Lean in un ambiente basato sulla tecnologia - Prove capacità di leadership, gestione degli stakeholder e comunicazione - Gestione di partner esterni e risorse contrattuali - Membro attivo di una comunità CI, con una mentalità collaborativa e condivisione delle conoscenze Ulteriori informazioni su di noi Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere.
descriptionByLocale.en: ## The opportunity In this role, you will report to the Department Manager of Project Management and support a growing global team of more than 70 Project Managers globally. You will play a key role in strengthening project execution excellence for our Gas Insulated Switchgear (GIS) customer projects by shaping robust processes, governance, and continuous improvement initiatives across a diverse project portfolio. This position offers a unique opportunity to combine strategic process ownership, portfolio governance, and continuous improvement leadership in an international project environment. ## How you'll make an impact - Develop, implement, and continuously improve project management processes, standards, and governance across a global project portfolio - Strengthen process and portfolio competence to ensure transparency and on‑time delivery (OTD) of customer projects - Translate lessons learned from project execution into structured continuous improvement (CI) actions - Lead and support mid‑term strategic project management initiatives in close cross‑functional collaboration - Act as an escalation point for systemic project management issues and drive sustainable resolutions - Ensure project management methods, tools, and IT systems are fit for purpose and continuously optimized - Leverage data analytics to support data‑driven decision‑making and identify improvement opportunities - Actively contribute to and collaborate within the CI community, fostering a learning and improvement culture ## Your background - 5+ years of experience in project management within complex, international project environments - Strong expertise in project management processes, governance, and portfolio management - Project Management Professional (PMP) certification - Lean Six Sigma Green Belt or Black Belt with a strong continuous improvement mindset - Experience in business analysis and applying Lean concepts in a technology-driven environment - Proven leadership, stakeholder management, and communication skills - Experience managing external partners and contract resources - Active member of a CI community, with a collaborative and knowledge-sharing mindset ## More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de: Die Gelegenheit In dieser Funktion melden Sie sich an den Abteilungsleiter des Projektmanagements und unterstützen ein wachsendes globales Team von über 70 Projektmanagern weltweit. Sie werden eine wichtige Rolle bei der Stärkung der Projektdurchführung für unsere Kundenprojekte Gas Insulated Switchgear (GIS) spielen, indem Sie robuste Prozesse, Governance und kontinuierliche Verbesserungsinitiativen in einem vielfältigen Projektportfolio ausarbeiten. Diese Position bietet eine einzigartige Gelegenheit, strategische Prozessbesitz, Portfolio Governance und kontinuierliche Verbesserung Führung in einem internationalen Projektumfeld zu kombinieren. Wie Sie einen Einfluss haben - Entwicklung, Umsetzung und kontinuierliche Verbesserung der Projektmanagementprozesse, Standards und Governance in einem globalen Projektportfolio - Prozess- und Portfoliokompetenz stärken, um Transparenz und pünktliche Lieferung (OTD) von Kundenprojekten zu gewährleisten - Übersetzen lernen von der Projektdurchführung in strukturierte kontinuierliche Verbesserung (CI) Aktionen - Leiten und unterstützen mittelfristige strategische Projektmanagementinitiativen in enger funktionsübergreifender Zusammenarbeit - Akt als Eskalationspunkt für systemische Projektmanagement-Themen und treiben nachhaltige Entschließungen - Stellen Sie sicher, dass Projektmanagementmethoden, Werkzeuge und IT-Systeme zielgerecht und kontinuierlich optimiert sind - Datenanalyse zur Unterstützung datengesteuerter Entscheidungsfindung und zur Identifizierung von Verbesserungsmöglichkeiten - Aktiver Beitrag und Zusammenarbeit innerhalb der CI-Gemeinschaft, Förderung einer Lern- und Verbesserungskultur Ihr Hintergrund - 5+ Jahre Erfahrung im Projektmanagement in komplexen, internationalen Projektumgebungen - Starkes Know-how im Projektmanagement, Governance und Portfoliomanagement - Projektmanagement Professional (PMP) Zertifizierung - Lean Six Sigma Green Belt oder Black Belt mit einer starken kontinuierlichen Verbesserung Mindset - Erfahrung in der Unternehmensanalyse und Anwendung von Lean-Konzepten in einer technologiegetriebenen Umgebung - Bewährte Führung, Stakeholder-Management und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten - Erfahrungsmanagement von externen Partnern und Vertragsressourcen - Aktives Mitglied einer CI-Gemeinschaft, mit einem kollaborativen und wissensteilenden Geistset Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen dabei, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistungsfähigkeit zu optimieren und eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.
descriptionByLocale.fr: L'opportunité Dans ce rôle, vous ferez rapport au gestionnaire de projet du Ministère et soutiendraz une équipe mondiale croissante de plus de 70 gestionnaires de projet à l'échelle mondiale. Vous jouerez un rôle clé dans le renforcement de l'excellence d'exécution des projets pour nos projets clients de commutateurs isolés au gaz (SIG) en formant des processus robustes, des initiatives de gouvernance et d'amélioration continue dans un portefeuille de projets diversifié. Ce poste offre une occasion unique de combiner l'appropriation stratégique des processus, la gouvernance du portefeuille et le leadership d'amélioration continue dans un environnement de projet international. Comment vous ferez un impact - Élaborer, mettre en œuvre et améliorer continuellement les processus de gestion de projet, les normes et la gouvernance dans un portefeuille de projets mondial - Renforcer les compétences en matière de processus et de portefeuille pour assurer la transparence et la livraison à temps des projets clients - Traduire les enseignements tirés de l'exécution de projets en actions d'amélioration continue structurée (IC) - Diriger et appuyer des initiatives de gestion de projet stratégique à moyen terme en étroite collaboration interfonctionnelle - Agir comme un point d'escalade pour les questions systémiques de gestion de projets et favoriser des résolutions durables - S'assurer que les méthodes de gestion de projet, les outils et les systèmes informatiques sont adaptés à l'objectif et optimisés en permanence - Tirer parti de l'analyse des données pour appuyer la prise de décision axée sur les données et identifier les possibilités d'amélioration - Contribuer activement et collaborer au sein de la communauté des IC, en favorisant une culture d'apprentissage et d'amélioration Vos antécédents - 5 ans d'expérience dans la gestion de projets dans des environnements de projets complexes et internationaux - Forte expertise en gestion de projets, gouvernance et gestion de portefeuille - Certification professionnelle de gestion de projet (PMP) - Lean Six Sigma ceinture verte ou ceinture noire avec une forte amélioration continue de l'état d'esprit - Expérience dans l'analyse des affaires et l'application des concepts Lean dans un environnement technologique - Compétences éprouvées en leadership, en gestion des intervenants et en communication - Expérience de la gestion des partenaires externes et des ressources contractuelles - Membre actif d'une communauté d'IC, avec un esprit de collaboration et de partage des connaissances Plus sur nous Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et professionnelle tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir.

jobs.title: Quality Operator 80 - 100% (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Position In unserem Werk BiMOS Backend in Lenzburg stellen wir effiziente und hochwertige Leistungshalbleiter für den Einsatz in Motorensteuerungen und Wechselrichtersystemen her. Damit leisten wir einen entscheidenden Beitrag, die Industrie, den öffentlichen und individuellen Verkehr energieeffizienter zu gestalten und andererseits ermöglicht unsere Technologie das Produzieren und Transportieren von erneuerbaren Energien vom Produktionsstandort hin zum Verbraucher. Unsere hoch-integrierte Industrie 4.0-Standard-Fertigung bietet ein spannendes und herausforderndes Arbeitsumfeld für den nächsten Quality Operator. Werde Teil der Energiewende und unterstütze uns, in unserer hochautomatisierten Fabrik qualitativ hervorragende Produkte her zu stellen. Das kannst du bewirken Bearbeitung von Produktionslosen nach geltender Arbeitsanweisung unter Reinraumbedingungen Bedienen und Überwachen von automatisierten Fertigungsanlagen Sicherstellen durchgehender Fertigungsqualität mit Hilfe von In-Prozess-Kontrollen und Einnahme der Kundensicht Aus- und Weiterbildung der Operatoren in Zusammenarbeit mit dem Qualitätstechniker und den Senior Operators Sicherstellung der Einhaltung von Arbeitssicherheits-, Gesundheits- und Umweltschutzvorschriften sowie von Ordnung und Sauberkeit in der Produktion Dein Hintergrund Abgeschlossene Lehre (technischer Hintergrund von Vorteil) oder vergleichbare Ausbildung Produktionserfahrung, idealerweise im Reinraum Manuelles Geschick, Zuverlässigkeit Gute Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift, sowie EDV-Anwenderkenntnisse (Grundkenntnisse in MS Office) Abgeschlossene Ausbildung und erste Erfahrung in der Qualitätssicherung von Vorteil Bereitschaft zur eigenen kontinuierlichen Weiterentwicklung und Schulung, sowie bereitschaft für Arbeit im ununterbrochenen Betrieb (Wochenende, Spät- & Nachtschicht) Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen dir, deine persönlichen und beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione Nel nostro impianto BiMOS Backend di Lenzburg produciamo semiconduttori di potenza efficienti e di alta qualità per l'utilizzo nei controlli dei motori e nei sistemi di inverter. In questo modo, forniamo un contributo decisivo per rendere più efficiente l'industria, il trasporto pubblico e individuale e, d'altra parte, la nostra tecnologia consente la produzione e il trasporto di energia rinnovabile dal sito produttivo al consumatore. La nostra produzione standard di alta integrazione Industry 4.0 offre un ambiente di lavoro emozionante e stimolante per il prossimo operatore di qualità. Fa parte della transizione energetica e ci supporta per produrre prodotti di ottima qualità nella nostra fabbrica altamente automatizzata. Puoi farlo. Mansioni - Trattamento delle persone senza produzione secondo le istruzioni applicabili in condizioni di camera pulita - Sistemi di produzione automatizzati di funzionamento e monitoraggio - Garantire una qualità di produzione continua con l'aiuto di controlli in processo - Prendere la vista del cliente - Formazione degli operatori in collaborazione con il tecnico di qualità e gli operatori senior - Garantire il rispetto della sicurezza del lavoro, delle norme sanitarie e ambientali, dell'ordine e della pulizia nella produzione
• Requisiti - insegnamento completo (fondo tecnico di vantaggio) o formazione comparabile - Esperienza di produzione, ideale nella camera pulita - Abilità manuale, affidabilità - Buona conoscenza del tedesco nella parola e nella scrittura, così come la conoscenza del computer (conoscenze di base in MS Office) - Formazione completa e prima esperienza nella garanzia della qualità - Volontà a continuare lo sviluppo e la formazione - prontezza per il lavoro in funzionamento continuo (fine settimana, turno di notte e tardi) Cosa? - I nostri metodi di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le tue prestazioni personali e professionali e a creare un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare e crescere le loro competenze. Contatto - Altro su di noi
descriptionByLocale.en:
Descrizione In our BiMOS Backend plant in Lenzburg we produce efficient and high-quality power semiconductors for use in engine controls and inverter systems. In this way, we make a decisive contribution to making industry, public and individual transport more energy-efficient and, on the other hand, our technology enables the production and transport of renewable energy from the production site to the consumer. Our high-integrated Industry 4.0 standard production offers an exciting and challenging working environment for the next quality operator. Be part of the energy transition and support us to produce excellent quality products in our highly automated factory. You can do that. Mansioni - Processing of productionless persons according to applicable instructions under clean room conditions - Operating and monitoring automated production systems - Ensure continuous production quality with the help of in-process controls - Taking customer view - Training of operators in cooperation with the quality technician and the senior operators - Ensuring compliance with work safety, health and environmental regulations, order and cleanliness in production
• Requisiti - Completed teaching (technical background of advantage) or comparable training - Production experience, ideal in the clean room - Manual skill, reliability - Good knowledge of German in word and writing, as well as computer knowledge (basic knowledge in MS Office) - Complete training and first experience in quality assurance of advantage - Willingness to continue development and training - readiness for work in continuous operation (weekend, late & night shift)
• Cosa offriamo - Our flexible working methods help you optimize your personal and professional performance, and create an environment where all employees can develop and grow their skills. Contatto - More about us

descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione Dans notre usine BIMOS Backend à Lenzburg, nous produisons des semi-conducteurs de puissance efficaces et de haute qualité pour les commandes de moteurs et les systèmes d'onduleur. De cette manière, nous contribuons de manière décisive à rendre l'industrie, les transports publics et individuels plus économes en énergie et, d'autre part, notre technologie permet la production et le transport d'énergies renouvelables du site de production au consommateur. Notre production standard Industrie 4.0 hautement intégrée offre un environnement de travail stimulant et stimulant pour le prochain opérateur de qualité. Faites partie de la transition énergétique et aidez-nous à produire des produits d'excellente qualité dans notre usine hautement automatisée. Tu peux le faire. Mansioni - Traitement des personnes sans production selon les instructions applicables dans des conditions de salle propre - Exploitation et surveillance des systèmes de production automatisés - Assurer une qualité de production continue grâce aux contrôles en cours de fabrication - Prise de vue du client - Formation des opérateurs en coopération avec le technicien de qualité et les opérateurs seniors - Assurer le respect des réglementations en matière de sécurité du travail, de santé et d'environnement, d'ordre et de propreté dans la production
• Requisiti - L'enseignement terminé (contexte technique d'avantage) ou une formation comparable - Expérience de production, idéal dans la salle blanche - Compétences manuelles, fiabilité - Bonne connaissance de l'allemand en paroles et en écriture, ainsi que des connaissances informatiques (connaissances de base dans le MS Office) - Formation complète et première expérience en assurance qualité de l'avantage - Volonté de poursuivre le développement et la formation - préparation au travail en service continu (fin de semaine, quart de nuit et tard)

jobs.title: Project Manager GIS High Voltage 80 - 100%
jobs.description: The opportunity  Do you want to have a global impact with your work? Do you enjoy leading an international project team, being strategic and doing project planning, risk analysis? Do you like to be hands-on too? We might have the perfect opportunity for you!   We are in the High Voltage Product group within Hitachi Energy, a leading specialist for power distribution and transmission. In our unit, the Gas Insulated Switchgears (GIS) – based in Zürich-Oerlikon, development and production of different GIS products are managed globally. We ensure high reliability of our systems by using state-of-the-art development tools and methods.     We are looking for someone to strengthen our GIS Project Manager team here in Zürich-Oerlikon. You will become part of a global team that operates from Switzerland, India and USA with very diverse backgrounds and experience as well. The position offers a lot of personal and professional development opportunities with flexible work possibilities – home office within Switzerland along with international customer exposure. You will represent Hitachi Energy towards our customers and manage GIS projects end to end.     Does this sound exciting? Contact us!   How you'll make an impact  Lead complex projects, managing all phases from sales handover to project closure  Build and maintain strong relationships with stakeholders, ensuring clear communication  Serve as the primary contact for international customers, leading meetings and factory acceptance tests  Identify, assess, and manage project risks while pursuing opportunities  Monitor project progress, resources, and financials effectively  Handle change, claim, and risk management, and report financials to the controlling team  Contribute to process improvements and participate in strategic initiatives  Your background  Min. 5 years of experience as a Project Manager in an industrial environment   Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, for effective stakeholder engagement  Experience in leading customer meetings and presentations  Strong understanding of risk management, financial reporting, and budget control  Professional certifications are highly valuable  Fluent in German or French, English is mandatory   More about us   Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

titleByLocale.fr: Gestionnaire de projet SIG Haute tension 80 - 100%

descriptionByLocale.it:
L'opportunità - Vuoi avere un impatto globale sul tuo lavoro? - Ti piace guidare un team di progetto internazionale, essere strategico e fare pianificazione del progetto, analisi dei rischi? - Ti piace avere le mani anche tu? - Potremmo avere l'opportunita' perfetta per te! - Siamo nel gruppo di prodotti ad alta tensione all'interno di Hitachi Energy, uno specialista leader per la distribuzione e la trasmissione di energia - Nella nostra unità, gli interruttori isolati a gas (GIS) – con sede a Zürich-Oerlikon, lo sviluppo e la produzione di diversi prodotti GIS sono gestiti a livello globale - Garantiamo elevata affidabilità dei nostri sistemi utilizzando strumenti e metodi di sviluppo all'avanguardia -
• Stiamo cercando qualcuno per rafforzare il nostro team di GIS Project Manager qui a Zurigo-Oerlikon - Diventerai parte di un team globale che opera dalla Svizzera, dall'India e dagli Stati Uniti con sfondi e esperienze molto diversi. - La posizione offre un sacco di opportunità di sviluppo personale e professionale con possibilità di lavoro flessibili – ufficio domestico all'interno della Svizzera insieme all'esposizione internazionale dei clienti - Tu rappresenterai Hitachi Energy verso i nostri clienti e gestirai i progetti GIS finiscono per finire - Sembra eccitante? - Contattaci! Come farai ad avere un impatto - Progetti complessi di piombo, gestione di tutte le fasi dalla consegna delle vendite alla chiusura del progetto - Costruire e mantenere forti relazioni con gli stakeholder, garantendo una comunicazione chiara - Servire come principale contatto per i clienti internazionali, i principali incontri e i test di accettazione di fabbrica - Identificare, valutare e gestire i rischi del progetto durante la ricerca di opportunità - Monitorare i progressi del progetto, le risorse e i finanziamenti in modo efficace - Mantenere il cambiamento, la rivendicazione e la gestione del rischio e riferire finanziaria al team di controllo - Contribuire ai miglioramenti del processo e partecipare a iniziative strategiche Il tuo sfondo - Min. 5 anni di esperienza come Project Manager in un ambiente industriale - Eccellente capacità di comunicazione, sia scritta che verbale, per un efficace impegno degli stakeholder - Esperienza nelle principali riunioni e presentazioni dei clienti - Forte comprensione della gestione del rischio, della rendicontazione finanziaria e del controllo del bilancio - Le certificazioni professionali sono altamente preziose - Fluente in tedesco o francese, l'inglese è obbligatorio Ulteriori informazioni su di noi - Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere
