Create clear documentation for prompt strategies and maintain best practices aligned with Hitachi Energy's AI Ethics Charter. Stay updated on emerging GenAI technologies, frameworks, and tools to enhance ACE capabilities. Implement and recommend best practices for prompting across different ACE modules. Your background Bachelor or master degree in electrical engineering Experience working in the transformer industry, with international standards and customer documentation. Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking. Strong linguistic and logical reasoning for crafting precise prompts. Strong understanding of NLP, context management, and token optimization. Ability to experiment and iterate to optimize outputs. Ability to understand business processes and translate them into ACE-specific prompts. Hands-on experience with LLMs and prompt engineering techniques. Strong interest in AI enterprise-grade solutions. Willingness to learn Python and experience with AI APIs services. Ability to work in Agile environments and manage multiple stakeholders. Excellent communication and collaboration skills. Analytical mindset with attention to detail. Empathy for end users and curiosity for experimentation. Commitment to ethical AI practices and continuous learning. Reduction in prompt failure rate and model hallucination. Improvement in accuracy of outputs by modules. Speed and scalability of prompt deployment across ACE modules within the Transformer Business Unit. Compliance with AI governance and security standards. More about us Be part of a global digital transformation initiative. Work on cutting-edge GenAI solutions. Collaborative culture with opportunities for career growth and innovation. We are committed to full transparency and compliance with all legal requirements, ensuring that every candidate knows exactly what to expect at each stage of the recruitment process. Once the process is successfully completed, we will share detailed information about financial conditions and benefits with the selected candidate. Before signing the employment contract, you will receive all remaining details of the offer, giving you the time and space to review everything carefully. * * Applicable only for Poland location align with local law regulations
descriptionByLocale.fr: The opportunity As part of our ongoing digital transformation journey, we are developing ACE, a cutting-edge Generative AI-powered platform designed to enhance the efficiency and accuracy of our Bid & Proposal Management process within the Transformers Business Unit. We are seeking a Prompt Engineer who will play a pivotal role in this initiative. This individual will be responsible for designing, testing, and optimizing domain-specific prompts that enable ACE to generate accurate, context-aware, and business-aligned outputs. The role requires a deep understanding of transformer industry, industrial equipment standards as well as basic understanding of prompt engineering best practices and GenAI model behavior, ensuring that ACE delivers high-quality responses tailored to complex business scenarios. The ideal candidate will collaborate closely with IT Experts, Subject Matter Experts, Business stakeholders, and Module Owners to break down complex business logic into domain-specific prompts. How you'll make an impact Develop, refine, and maintain prompt libraries for various transformer units\/factories. Implement advanced techniques like prompt chaining, context injection, and few-shot learning for enterprise-grade accuracy. Own prompt lifecycle management including versioning, traceability, and governance. Evaluate LLM responses for precision, compliance, and bias mitigation. Conduct A\/B testing and maintain performance dashboards for prompt effectiveness. Work closely with Module Owners, Subject Matter Experts, and Business Stakeholders to embed prompts into ACE workflows. Create clear documentation for prompt strategies and maintain best practices aligned with Hitachi Energy's AI Ethics Charter. Stay updated on emerging GenAI technologies, frameworks, and tools to enhance ACE capabilities. Implement and recommend best practices for prompting across different ACE modules. Your background Bachelor or master degree in electrical engineering Experience working in the transformer industry, with international standards and customer documentation. Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking. Strong linguistic and logical reasoning for crafting precise prompts. Strong understanding of NLP, context management, and token optimization. Ability to experiment and iterate to optimize outputs. Ability to understand business processes and translate them into ACE-specific prompts. Hands-on experience with LLMs and prompt engineering techniques. Strong interest in AI enterprise-grade solutions. Willingness to learn Python and experience with AI APIs services. Ability to work in Agile environments and manage multiple stakeholders. Excellent communication and collaboration skills. Analytical mindset with attention to detail. Empathy for end users and curiosity for experimentation. Commitment to ethical AI practices and continuous learning. Reduction in prompt failure rate and model hallucination. Improvement in accuracy of outputs by modules. Speed and scalability of prompt deployment across ACE modules within the Transformer Business Unit. Compliance with AI governance and security standards. More about us Be part of a global digital transformation initiative. Work on cutting-edge GenAI solutions. Collaborative culture with opportunities for career growth and innovation. We are committed to full transparency and compliance with all legal requirements, ensuring that every candidate knows exactly what to expect at each stage of the recruitment process. Once the process is successfully completed, we will share detailed information about financial conditions and benefits with the selected candidate. jobs.title: Global IT Manager for Business Unit Grid Automation
jobs.description: The opportunity The Grid Automation Business Unit of Hitachi Energy is seeking a dynamic Global IT Leader for the role of Global BST Manager, Grid Automation, to lead an existing team of over forty IT Professionals in supporting and advancing Grid Automation's global businesses and digital IT transformation initiatives. Business Solution Teams (BSTs) in each Business Unit (BU) have complete responsibility for managing BU-specific applications and Infrastructure services, including service delivery. They oversee and control these applications and services while adhering to global governance and security standards.  BSTs design and implement the IT Roadmap and Application Landscape for their respective BUs to align with business requirements. They closely collaborate with global departments to help deliver function-wide applications and enterprise platforms. How you will make an impact Lead Business relationship management with BUs including BST Leadership and guidance across BU\/HUB\/GPG\/Functions. Lead IT Demand Mgt to meet Business requirements. Management and governance of the BST IT organization to support and deliver on Demand priorities. Accountable for Application Management for BU specific applications, Infrastructure\/ Onsite Service Delivery Operational Management of BST assigned Sites. Support IT\/OT Cybersecurity Onsite Service Delivery Operational Management of BST assigned Sites. Digital Transformation IT Build Deployments to support growth of business. Accountable for the total IT offering to the business and provide interface to relevant IT partners, articulating the needs of the business to the relevant IT partners to ensure impactful support to the business. Ensure alignment of IT roadmap to business needs through communication and active feedback loops between stakeholders and IT organization. Define and implement strategic IT priorities in the organization in line with BU strategy and Strategic Business initiatives, covering business functions application landscape, utilizing the existing IT solutions portfolio or ensuring to provide new solutions, where appropriate. Understand the business demands, the current and long-term business strategy and translate them into opportunities for IT to add value to the business. Implement and ensure compliance with global and local standards, tools, processes related to operations\/projects execution. Analyze results of internal and external audits and identify common areas of improvement within the organization. Provide the BU escalation point for all IT related issues. Responsible for BST budget and investments and creating transparency on business unit IT costs. Setting standard documentation for audits and their records, findings and reports. Develop and share best practices across BST community. Foster communication between BU and IT organization. Ensure (with HR support) that the area of responsibility is properly organized, staffed, skilled and directed. Guides, motivates and develops direct and indirect subordinates within HR policies, for the benefit of both company and the employee. Your background Minimum 15+ years of professional working experience in IT. 10+ years' experience working in global and diverse organizations with understanding of Infrastructure, Applications and platforms. A bachelor's degree is required; a master's degree is preferred. Strong written and verbal communication skills. Highly organized with attention to detail. Proven success working in matrixed organizations. Capable of successfully leading remote teams across multiple time zones More about us: Hitachi Energy is a global technology leader that is advancing a sustainable energy future for all. We serve customers in the utility, industry and infrastructure sectors with innovative solutions and services across the value chain. descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione L'occasione The Grid Automation Business Unit di Hitachi Energy è alla ricerca di un Global IT Leader dinamico per il ruolo di Global BST Manager, Grid Automation, per guidare un team esistente di oltre quaranta professionisti IT nel sostenere e promuovere le attività globali di Grid Automation e le iniziative di trasformazione IT digitale. Business Solution Teams (BSTs) in ogni Business Unit (BU) hanno la completa responsabilità per la gestione delle applicazioni specifiche BU e dei servizi di infrastruttura, compresa la consegna dei servizi. Essi supervisionano e controllano queste applicazioni e servizi, rispettando gli standard di governance e sicurezza globali. BST progetta e implementa la Roadmap IT e Application Landscape per i rispettivi BU per allineare con i requisiti aziendali. Collaborano strettamente con i dipartimenti globali per aiutare a fornire applicazioni e piattaforme aziendali a livello di funzionalità. Mansioni - Gestione delle relazioni aziendali con i BU, tra cui Leadership BST e guida attraverso BU/HUB/GPG/Functions. - Lead IT Demand Mgt per soddisfare i requisiti aziendali. - Gestione e governance dell'organizzazione BST IT per sostenere e fornire le priorità della domanda. - Contabile per la gestione delle applicazioni per applicazioni specifiche BU, Infrastructure/ Onsite Service Delivery Operational Management dei Siti assegnati BST. - Supporto IT/OT Cybersecurity Insite Service Delivery Gestione Operativa dei Siti assegnati BST. - Digital Transformation IT Build Deployments per sostenere la crescita del business. - Contabile per l'offerta IT totale al business e fornire l'interfaccia ai partner IT rilevanti, articolando le esigenze del business ai partner IT rilevanti per garantire un supporto efficace al business. - Assicurare l'allineamento della roadmap IT alle esigenze aziendali attraverso la comunicazione e i loop di feedback attivi tra gli stakeholder e l'organizzazione IT. - Definire e implementare le priorità IT strategiche nell'organizzazione in linea con le iniziative di strategia BU e Strategic Business, coprendo il panorama delle applicazioni delle funzioni aziendali, utilizzando il portafoglio soluzioni IT esistente o garantendo nuove soluzioni, se del caso. - Comprendere le esigenze aziendali, la strategia aziendale attuale e a lungo termine e tradurli in opportunità per l'IT per aggiungere valore al business. - Implementare e garantire il rispetto di standard globali e locali, strumenti, processi relativi all'esecuzione di operazioni/progetti. - Analizzare i risultati degli audit interni ed esterni e identificare le aree comuni di miglioramento all'interno dell'organizzazione. - Fornire il punto di escalation BU per tutti i problemi relativi all'IT. - Responsabile del bilancio BST e degli investimenti e della trasparenza dei costi dell'unità aziendale IT. - Impostare la documentazione standard per gli audit e i loro record, risultati e report. - Sviluppare e condividere le migliori pratiche nella comunità BST. - Promuovere la comunicazione tra BU e l'organizzazione IT. - Assicurare (con il supporto HR) che l'area di responsabilità sia adeguatamente organizzata, personale, qualificata e diretta. - Guide, motiva e sviluppa subalterni diretti e indiretti all'interno delle politiche HR, a beneficio sia dell'azienda che del dipendente.
• Requisiti - Minimo 15+ anni di esperienza professionale in IT. - 10+ anni di esperienza lavorando in organizzazioni globali e diverse con la comprensione di Infrastrutture, Applicazioni e piattaforme. - È richiesto un diploma di laurea; un master è preferito. - Forte capacità di comunicazione scritta e verbale. - Altamente organizzato con attenzione ai dettagli. - E' stato un successo a lavorare in organizzazioni matrici. - Capacità di condurre con successo squadre remote in più fusi orari Chi siamo Hitachi Energy è un leader tecnologico globale che sta promuovendo un futuro energetico sostenibile per tutti. Serviamo i clienti nei settori dell'utilità, dell'industria e delle infrastrutture con soluzioni e servizi innovativi in tutta la catena del valore. Insieme a clienti e partner, pionieri delle tecnologie e consentiamo la trasformazione digitale necessaria per accelerare la transizione energetica verso

## Descrizione The opportunity The Grid Automation Business Unit of Hitachi Energy is seeking a dynamic Global IT Leader for the role of Global BST Manager, Grid Automation, to lead an existing team of over forty IT Professionals in supporting and advancing Grid Automation's global businesses and digital IT transformation initiatives. Business Solution Teams (BSTs) in each Business Unit (BU) have complete responsibility for managing BU-specific applications and Infrastructure services, including service delivery. They oversee and control these applications and services while adhering to global governance and security standards. BSTs design and implement the IT Roadmap and Application Landscape for their respective BUs to align with business requirements. They closely collaborate with global departments to help deliver function-wide applications and enterprise platforms. ## Mansioni - Lead Business relationship management with BUs including BST Leadership and guidance across BU/HUB/GPG/Functions. - Lead IT Demand Mgt to meet Business requirements. - Management and governance of the BST IT organization to support and deliver on Demand priorities. - Accountable for Application Management for BU specific applications, Infrastructure/ Onsite Service Delivery Operational Management of BST assigned Sites. - Support IT/OT Cybersecurity Onsite Service Delivery Operational Management of BST assigned Sites. - Digital Transformation IT Build Deployments to support growth of business. - Accountable for the total IT offering to the business and provide interface to relevant IT partners, articulating the needs of the business to the relevant IT partners to ensure impactful support to the business. - Ensure alignment of IT roadmap to business needs through communication and active feedback loops between stakeholders and IT organization. - Define and implement strategic IT priorities in the organization in line with BU strategy and Strategic Business initiatives, covering business functions application landscape, utilizing the existing IT solutions portfolio or ensuring to provide new solutions, where appropriate. - Understand the business demands, the current and long-term business strategy and translate them into opportunities for IT to add value to the business. - Implement and ensure compliance with global and local standards, tools, processes related to operations/projects execution. - Analyze results of internal and external audits and identify common areas of improvement within the organization. - Provide the BU escalation point for all IT related issues. - Responsible for BST budget and investments and creating transparency on business unit IT costs. - Setting standard documentation for audits and their records, findings and reports. - Develop and share best practices across BST community. - Foster communication between BU and IT organization. - Ensure (with HR support) that the area of responsibility is properly organized, staffed, skilled and directed. - Guides, motivates and develops direct and indirect subordinates within HR policies, for the benefit of both company and the employee. ##
• Requisiti - Minimum 15+ years of professional working experience in IT. - 10+ years' experience working in global and diverse organizations with understanding of Infrastructure, Applications and platforms. - A bachelor's degree is required; a master's degree is preferred. - Strong written and verbal communication skills. - Highly organized with attention to detail. - Proven success working in matrixed organizations. - Capable of successfully leading remote teams across multiple time zones ## Chi siamo Hitachi Energy is a global technology leader that is advancing a sustainable energy future for all. We serve customers in the utility, industry and infrastructure sectors with innovative solutions and services across the value chain. Together with customers and partners, we pioneer technologies and enable the digital transformation required to accelerate the energy transition toward
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Die Gelegenheit Die Grid Automation Business Unit von Hitachi Energy sucht einen dynamischen Global IT Leader für die Rolle von Global BST Manager, Grid Automation, um ein bestehendes Team von über vierzig IT-Experten bei der Unterstützung und Weiterentwicklung von Grid Automations globalen Unternehmen und digitalen IT-Transformationsinitiativen zu leiten. Business Solution Teams (BSTs) in jeder Business Unit (BU) haben die volle Verantwortung für die Verwaltung von BU-spezifischen Anwendungen und Infrastrukturdienstleistungen, einschließlich Service-Lieferung. Sie überwachen und kontrollieren diese Anwendungen und Dienstleistungen und haften dabei an globalen Governance- und Sicherheitsstandards. BSTs entwerfen und implementieren die IT Roadmap und Application Landscape für ihre jeweiligen BUs, um sich an die Geschäftsanforderungen anzupassen. Sie arbeiten eng mit globalen Abteilungen zusammen, um funktionsweite Anwendungen und Unternehmensplattformen zu liefern. Mansion - Führen Sie Business-Beziehungsmanagement mit BUs einschließlich BST Führung und Beratung über BU/HUB/GPG/Funktionen. - Führen Sie die IT-Anforderung Mgt, um die Geschäftsanforderungen zu erfüllen. - Management und Governance der BST IT-Organisation, um die Prioritäten der Nachfrage zu unterstützen und zu liefern. - Buchbar für Application Management für BU-spezifische Anwendungen, Infrastruktur / Vor-Ort-Service-Lieferung Betriebliches Management von BST zugewiesenen Websites. - Unterstützung von IT/OT Cybersecurity Onsite Service Delivery Operational Management von BST zugewiesenen Websites. - Digitale Transformation IT-Erstellung zur Unterstützung des Unternehmenswachstums. - Buchbar für das gesamte IT-Angebot für das Unternehmen und bieten Schnittstelle zu relevanten IT-Partnern und artikulieren die Bedürfnisse des Unternehmens an die relevanten IT-Partner, um eine wirkungsvolle Unterstützung für das Unternehmen zu gewährleisten. - Stellen Sie die Ausrichtung der IT-Roadmap auf die geschäftlichen Bedürfnisse durch Kommunikation und aktive Feedback-Schleifen zwischen Stakeholdern und IT-Organisation sicher. - Definieren und implementieren Sie strategische IT-Prioritäten in der Organisation im Einklang mit BU-Strategie und Strategischen Business-Initiativen, die Business-Funktionen Anwendungslandschaft abdecken, das bestehende IT-Lösungen-Portfolio nutzen oder gegebenenfalls neue Lösungen bereitstellen. - Verstehen Sie die Geschäftsanforderungen, die aktuelle und langfristige Geschäftsstrategie und übersetzen Sie sie in Möglichkeiten für IT, um Mehrwert für das Unternehmen zu schaffen. - Umsetzung und Sicherstellung der Einhaltung globaler und lokaler Standards, Werkzeuge, Prozesse im Zusammenhang mit der Ausführung von Operationen/Projekten. - Analyse der Ergebnisse interner und externer Audits und Identifizierung gemeinsamer Verbesserungsbereiche innerhalb der Organisation. - Geben Sie den BU-Eskalationspunkt für alle IT-relevanten Fragen. - Verantwortlich für den BST-Haushalt und Investitionen und die Schaffung von Transparenz auf den IT-Kosten der Geschäftseinheit. - Standarddokumentation für Audits und deren Aufzeichnungen, Ergebnisse und Berichte. - Entwickeln und teilen Sie Best Practices in der BST-Community. - Foster Kommunikation zwischen BU und IT-Organisation. - Stellen Sie sicher (mit HR-Unterstützung), dass der Zuständigkeitsbereich ordnungsgemäß organisiert, bedienstet, qualifiziert und geleitet ist. - Guides, motiviert und entwickelt direkte und indirekte Untergeben innerhalb der HR-Politik, zum Nutzen von Unternehmen und Arbeitnehmer. Voraussetzungen - Mindestens 15 Jahre Berufserfahrung in der IT. - 10 Jahre Erfahrung in der Arbeit in globalen und vielfältigen Organisationen mit dem Verständnis von Infrastruktur, Anwendungen und Plattformen. - Ein Bachelor-Abschluss ist erforderlich; ein Master-Abschluss ist bevorzugt. - Starke schriftliche und mündliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. - Hoch organisiert mit Liebe zum Detail. - Bewiesener Erfolg in Matrix-Organisationen. - Erfasst erfolgreich führende Remote-Teams in mehreren Zeitzonen Chi siamo Hitachi Energy ist ein globaler Technologieführer, der für alle eine nachhaltige Energie Zukunft vorantreibt. Wir bedienen Kunden in den Bereichen Energieversorgung, Industrie und Infrastruktur mit innovativen Lösungen und Dienstleistungen in der gesamten Wertschöpfungskette. Gemeinsam mit Kunden und Partnern sind wir Pioniertechnologien und ermöglichen die digitale Transformation, die erforderlich ist, um den Energiewandel in Richtung
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione L'occasion La Grid Automation Business Unit de Hitachi Energy cherche un leader informatique mondial dynamique pour le rôle de Global BST Manager, Grid Automation, pour diriger une équipe existante de plus de quarante professionnels de l'informatique dans le soutien et la progression des entreprises mondiales de Grid Automation et des initiatives de transformation informatique numérique. Les équipes de solutions d'affaires (ETB) de chaque unité opérationnelle (UB) sont entièrement responsables de la gestion des applications spécifiques à l'UB et des services d'infrastructure, y compris la prestation des services. Ils supervisent et contrôlent ces applications et services tout en respectant les normes mondiales de gouvernance et de sécurité. Les BST conçoivent et mettent en œuvre la feuille de route informatique et le paysage d'application pour leurs UB respectives afin de les aligner sur les exigences opérationnelles. Ils collaborent étroitement avec les départements mondiaux pour fournir des applications à l'échelle de la fonction et des plateformes d'entreprise. Mansioni - Diriger la gestion des relations d'affaires avec les BU, y compris le leadership et l'orientation en matière de BU/HUB/GPG/Functions. - Diriger la demande de TI pour répondre aux exigences de l'entreprise. - La gestion et la gouvernance de l'organisation IT de la BST pour appuyer et réaliser les priorités de la demande. - Responsable de la gestion des applications pour des applications spécifiques à l'UB, Infrastructure/ Prestation de services sur place Gestion opérationnelle des sites assignés à la TVB. - Soutenir la cybersécurité informatique/OT sur place Prestation des services Gestion opérationnelle des sites assignés à la TVB. - Transformation numérique Construction des TI Déploiements pour soutenir la croissance des entreprises. - Responsable de l'offre totale de TI à l'entreprise et fournit une interface aux partenaires informatiques concernés, articulant les besoins de l'entreprise aux partenaires informatiques concernés pour assurer un soutien efficace à l'entreprise. - Veiller à ce que la feuille de route de la TI soit alignée sur les besoins opérationnels au moyen de communications et de boucles de rétroaction actives entre les intervenants et l'organisation de la TI. - Définir et mettre en œuvre les priorités stratégiques en matière de TI dans l'organisation, conformément à la stratégie de l'UB et aux initiatives stratégiques en matière d'affaires, couvrant le paysage des applications des fonctions opérationnelles, en utilisant le portefeuille de solutions informatiques existant ou en veillant à fournir de nouvelles solutions, le cas échéant. - Comprendre les exigences de l'entreprise, la stratégie d'affaires actuelle et à long terme et les traduire en opportunités pour que l'informatique ajoute de la valeur à l'entreprise. - Mettre en œuvre et assurer le respect des normes, outils et processus mondiaux et locaux relatifs à l'exécution des opérations/projets. - Analyser les résultats des audits internes et externes et identifier les domaines communs d'amélioration au sein de l'organisation. - Fournir le point d'escalade BU pour toutes les questions liées aux TI. - Responsable du budget et des investissements de la BST et de la transparence des coûts informatiques unitaires. - Établir des documents normalisés pour les audits et leurs dossiers, constatations et rapports. - Élaborer et partager des pratiques exemplaires dans la collectivité de la TVB. - Favoriser la communication entre BU et l'organisation informatique. - Veiller (avec le soutien des RH) à ce que le domaine de responsabilité soit bien organisé, doté de personnel, qualifié et dirigé. - Guider, motiver et développer des subordonnés directs et indirects dans le cadre des politiques RH, au profit de l'entreprise et de l'employé.
• Requisiti - Au moins 15 ans d'expérience professionnelle en informatique. - 10 ans et plus d'expérience dans des organisations mondiales et diverses avec une compréhension de l'infrastructure, des applications et des plateformes. - Un baccalauréat est requis; une maîtrise est préférée. - Forte capacité de communication écrite et verbale. - Très organisé avec attention aux détails. - Un succès avéré dans les organisations matricielles. - Capable de diriger avec succès des équipes éloignées sur plusieurs fuseaux horaires Chi siamo Hitachi Energy est un leader technologique mondial qui fait progresser un avenir énergétique durable pour tous. Nous servons nos clients dans les secteurs des services publics, de l'industrie et de l'infrastructure avec des solutions et des services innovants tout au long de la chaîne de valeur. Avec les clients et les partenaires, nous sommes les pionniers des technologies et nous permettons la transformation numérique nécessaire pour accélérer la transition énergétique vers

jobs.title: Global BU Sales Leader - Grid Automation
jobs.description: Join Hitachi Energy's Grid Automation business as our Global Head of Sales. You will lead a global team driving commercial strategy and sales execution across a portfolio that includes enterprise software, automation and communications, power conversion solutions and services. This is a high-impact leadership role at the center of our global go-to-market transformation (Suisen)—focused on customer connection, agility, empowerment, and commercial excellence. You will work across product lines and regions to align diverse sales teams and deliver growth, while shaping how we serve customers in a rapidly evolving energy landscape. The location of this role is flexible globally and will be determined in subsequent stages. How You'll Make an Impact Lead global sales performance across all Grid Automation offerings. Manage a small central team of industry leaders and functional experts focused on global sales strategy and governance. Provide dotted-line leadership to sales leaders in global product groups and regional hubs. Align multiple sales operating models under a unified go-to-market strategy. Drive forecasting discipline, pipeline health, and deal governance. Champion customer-first sales execution and strategic account leadership. Accelerate growth in software, digital, and lifecycle-based offerings. Expand reach through partner ecosystems and channel programs. Collaborate with regional, product, and functional leaders to ensure execution. Lead through transformation, simplifying structures and empowering teams. Your Background 15+ years in global sales leadership roles in energy, software, or industrial sectors. Proven success managing complex, matrixed sales organizations. Experience leading sales transformation or go-to-market redesigns. Strong commercial acumen and forecasting discipline. Familiarity with enterprise software, automation, and power systems. Executive presence and ability to influence across functions and geographies. Bachelor's degree required; advanced degree preferred. Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus.

descriptionByLocale.de: Join Hitachi Energy's Grid Automation business as our Global Head of Sales. You will lead a global team driving commercial strategy and sales execution across a portfolio that includes enterprise software, automation and communications, power conversion solutions and services. This is a high-impact leadership role at the center of our global go-to-market transformation (Suisen)—focused on customer connection, agility, empowerment, and commercial excellence. You will work across product lines and regions to align diverse sales teams and deliver growth, while shaping how we serve customers in a rapidly evolving energy landscape. The location of this role is flexible globally and will be determined in subsequent stages. How You'll Make an Impact Lead global sales performance across all Grid Automation offerings. Manage a small central team of industry leaders and functional experts focused on global sales strategy and governance. Provide dotted-line leadership to sales leaders in global product groups and regional hubs. Align multiple sales operating models under a unified go-to-market strategy. Drive forecasting discipline, pipeline health, and deal governance. Champion customer-first sales execution and strategic account leadership. Accelerate growth in software, digital, and lifecycle-based offerings. Expand reach through partner ecosystems and channel programs. Collaborate with regional, product, and functional leaders to ensure execution. Lead through transformation, simplifying structures and empowering teams. Your Background 15+ years in global sales leadership roles in energy, software, or industrial sectors. Proven success managing complex, matrixed sales organizations. Experience leading sales transformation or go-to-market redesigns. Strong commercial acumen and forecasting discipline. Familiarity with enterprise software, automation, and power systems. Executive presence and ability to influence across functions and geographies. Bachelor's degree required; advanced degree preferred. Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus.

jobs.title: Mitarbeiter/in Endprüfung 80 - 100% (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Position Als Mitarbeiter Endprüfung bei Hitachi Energy bist du ein entscheidendes Bindeglied zwischen Produktion und Auslieferung. Du stellst sicher, dass unsere Produkte vor der Freigabe höchsten Qualitäts-, Sicherheits- und Dokumentationsanforderungen entsprechen. Mit deinem Qualitätsbewusstsein und deinem strukturierten Vorgehen trägst du maßgeblich zur Zuverlässigkeit unserer Produkte und zur Zufriedenheit unserer Kunden bei. Das kannst du bewirken Testen von Generatorleistungsschaltern im Prüffeld (80%): Prüfen der Generator Leistungsschalter gemäss vorgegebenem Prüfplan Bewertung der Messergebnisse Durchführung von Kundenabnahmen in Englischer Sprache Erkennen von mechanischen und elektrischen Fehlern Analyse und Korrektur von Verdrahtungsfehlern im Steuerschrank Übernahme der Verantwortung für das Prüfen der zugeteilten Schalter (zeitlicher Ablauf sowie Qualität der Prüfung) Mitarbeit bei der Verbesserung des Messequipments sowie der Prüfprozesse Montage- und Verdrahtungsarbeiten (20%): Selbstständige Verdrahtung von Baugruppen und Schaltersystemen gemäss Arbeitspapieren wie Kundenauftrag, Elektroschema, Checkliste und Arbeits­plan Montage von PGHV-Produkten entsprechend der in den Qualitätssicherungsverfahren und Arbeitsanweisungen festgehaltenen Vorgaben und Zielsetzungen Lesen und verstehen von technischen Zeichnungen und Stücklisten Das bringst du mit Abgeschlossene elektrotechnische Grundausbildung (Automatiker EFZ, o.ä.) Erfahrung im lesen und verstehen von elektrischen Schemas, Montagezeichnungen und Arbeitsanweisungen Kenntnisse der Prüfung elektrischer Maschinen und von Steuerschränken sind von Vorteil Sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse (mündlich, schriftlich) Affinität zu Computern (Messequipment, diverse Softwaretools, Dokumentation erstellen und pflegen) Gutes Verständnis für Arbeitssicherheit, hohes Qualitätsbewusstsein sowie kundenorientiertes Denken und professioneller Umgang mit Kunden Mehr über uns Hitachi Energy steht für innovative Technologien und nachhaltige Energielösungen weltweit. Bei uns erwartet dich ein sicherer Arbeitsplatz in einem zukunftsorientierten Unternehmen, spannende Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, ein kollegiales und wertschätzendes Arbeitsumfeld sowie attraktive Sozialleistungen.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione Come controllo finale dei dipendenti presso Hitachi Energy, sei un collegamento chiave tra produzione e consegna. Assicurati che i nostri prodotti soddisfino i requisiti di alta qualità, sicurezza e documentazione prima che vengano rilasciati. Con la vostra consapevolezza della qualità e il vostro approccio strutturato, contribuite in modo significativo all'affidabilità dei nostri prodotti e alla soddisfazione dei nostri clienti. - Interruttori di potenza del generatore di prova nel campo di prova (80%): - Testare gli interruttori del circuito del generatore secondo il piano di prova specificato - Valutazione dei risultati delle misurazioni - Attuazione dell'accettazione del cliente in inglese - rilevazione di guasti meccanici ed elettrici - Analisi e correzione degli errori di cablaggio nell'armadietto di controllo - assumersi la responsabilità di testare gli interruttori assegnati (funzionamento tempestivo e qualità del test) - Lavorare con il miglioramento delle attrezzature espositive e dei processi di test - Lavori di installazione e cablaggio (20%): - Auto-wiring di assiemi e sistemi di commutazione secondo carte di lavoro come l'ordine del cliente, diagramma elettrico, checklist e piano di lavoro - Assemblaggio dei prodotti PGHV secondo i requisiti e gli obiettivi stabiliti nelle procedure di garanzia della qualità e nelle istruzioni di lavoro - Leggere e comprendere disegni e liste tecniche
• Requisiti - Formazione elettrotecnica di base completata (automatica EFZ, ecc.) - Esperienza nella lettura e comprensione di schemi elettrici, disegni di montaggio e istruzioni di lavoro - la conoscenza dei test delle macchine elettriche e degli armadi di controllo sono vantaggiosi - Ottima conoscenza del tedesco e dell'inglese (orale, scritto) - Affinità per computer (messequipment, vari strumenti software, documentazione e manutenzione) - Buona comprensione della sicurezza del lavoro, della consapevolezza di alta qualità e del pensiero orientato al cliente e della gestione professionale dei clienti Cosa? - Hitachi Energy è sinonimo di tecnologie innovative e soluzioni energetiche sostenibili in tutto il mondo. - Ci aspettiamo un posto di lavoro sicuro in un'azienda orientata al futuro, interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, un ambiente di lavoro collegiale e a valore aggiunto e benefici sociali attraenti.
descriptionByLocale.en:
Descrizione As an employee final check at Hitachi Energy, you are a key link between production and delivery. You make sure our products meet the highest quality, safety and documentation requirements before they are released. With your quality awareness and your structured approach, you contribute significantly to the reliability of our products and to the satisfaction of our customers. - Testing generator power switches in the test field (80%): - Testing the generator circuit breakers according to the specified test plan - Evaluation of measurement results - Implementation of customer acceptance in English - detection of mechanical and electrical faults - Analysis and correction of wiring errors in the control cabinet - take responsibility for testing the assigned switches (timely running and quality of the test) - Working with the improvement of the exhibition equipment and the testing processes - Installation and wiring work (20%): - Self-wiring of assemblies and switch systems according to working papers such as customer order, electrical diagram, checklist and work plan - Assembly of PGHV products according to the requirements and objectives set out in the quality assurance procedures and work instructions - Read and understand technical drawings and lists
• Requisiti - Completed basic electrotechnical training (automatic EFZ, etc.) - Experience in reading and understanding electrical schemes, assembly drawings and work instructions - knowledge of the testing of electrical machines and control cabinets are advantageous - Very good knowledge of German and English ( oral, written) - Affinity for computers (messequipment, various software tools, documentation and maintenance) - Good understanding of work safety, high quality awareness and customer-oriented thinking and professional handling of customers
• Cosa offriamo - Hitachi Energy stands for innovative technologies and sustainable energy solutions worldwide. - We expect a safe workplace in a future-oriented company, exciting development opportunities, a collegial and value-adding working environment and attractive social benefits.

descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione En tant qu'employé de vérification finale chez Hitachi Energy, vous êtes un lien clé entre la production et la livraison. Vous vous assurez que nos produits répondent aux exigences de qualité, de sécurité et de documentation les plus élevées avant leur libération. Avec votre sensibilisation à la qualité et votre approche structurée, vous contribuez de manière significative à la fiabilité de nos produits et à la satisfaction de nos clients. - Essai des interrupteurs du générateur dans le champ d'essai (80 %) : - Essai des disjoncteurs du générateur selon le plan d'essai spécifié - Évaluation des résultats de mesure - Mise en œuvre de l'acceptation du client en anglais - détection des défauts mécaniques et électriques - Analyse et correction des erreurs de câblage dans l'armoire de commande - assumer la responsabilité de l'essai des interrupteurs assignés (exécution en temps voulu et qualité de l'essai); - Travailler à l'amélioration du matériel d'exposition et des processus d'essai - Installation et câblage (20 %) : - Auto-remorquage des assemblages et des systèmes de commutation selon les documents de travail tels que l'ordre du client, le diagramme électrique, la liste de contrôle et le plan de travail - Montage des produits PGHV selon les exigences et objectifs définis dans les procédures d'assurance qualité et les instructions de travail - Lire et comprendre les dessins techniques et les listes
• Requisiti - Formation électrotechnique de base (EFZ automatique, etc.) - Expérience de la lecture et de la compréhension des schémas électriques, des plans de montage et des instructions de travail - la connaissance des essais des machines électriques et des armoires de commande est avantageuse - Très bonne connaissance de l'allemand et de l'anglais (oral, écrit) - Affinité pour les ordinateurs (matériel, divers outils logiciels, documentation et maintenance) - Bonne compréhension de la sécurité au travail, sensibilisation de haute qualité, réflexion orientée client et gestion professionnelle des clients
• Cosa offriamo - Hitachi Energy est synonyme de technologies innovantes et de solutions énergétiques durables dans le monde entier. - Nous nous attendons à un lieu de travail sûr dans une entreprise tournée vers l'avenir, des possibilités de développement passionnantes, un environnement de travail collégial et valorisant et des avantages sociaux attrayants.

jobs.title: Technical Buyer 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Hitachi Energy, High Voltage Products, is renowned worldwide as a specialist for power transmission and distribution. The Service unit is responsible for the worldwide after sales support of generator circuit-breaker (GCB) systems and gas insulated switchgears (GIS), including training, installation and commissioning, scheduled maintenance, added value services, troubleshooting, extensions, retrofits and replacements. As a Technical Buyer, you act as a key interface between Procurement, Engineering, Quality, and our global supplier network. You ensure that technically specified materials, components, and services are clearly defined, technically clarified, qualified, and available in line with project, quality, and delivery requirements. Through close cross‑functional collaboration, you translate engineering requirements into robust sourcing solutions and support supplier qualification and technical alignment. Your role contributes directly to product quality, supply reliability, and operational excellence, enabling Hitachi Energy to deliver innovative and sustainable energy solutions to our customers worldwide. How you'll make an impact Perform technical clarification of materials, drawings, specifications, and engineering changes in close collaboration with Engineering and suppliers Support and coordinate Production Part Approval Process (PPAP) activities, first samples, and supplier qualification processes Conduct technical evaluations of alternative materials, deviation requests, and obsolescence cases Collaborate closely with Strategic and Operational Buyers on supplier- and material-related topics Support the handling of supplier complaints, Non‑Conformity Reports (NCRs), and root cause analyses Support and participate in supplier assessments and technical supplier evaluations, including capability, quality, and process maturity reviews Contribute to supplier performance evaluations together with Quality and Strategic Procurement Ensure accuracy and completeness of material and supplier master data in SAP and act as the technical contact point during supplier escalations Support Service Organization and Project Teams in complex or urgent procurement topics Your background Completed technical education (e.g. Polymechanic, Automation Technician, Mechanical Technician, Design Engineer or similar) 3-5 years experience in technical procurement or SCM‑related roles Strong understanding of technical drawings, Bill of Material and manufacturing processes Experience working with suppliers on technical and quality‑related topics Structured, solution‑oriented, and communicative working style Good German skills and very good English skills SAP knowledge Proactive, structured, and solution-focused working style. Team oriented mindset with strong cross-functional collaboration More about us   Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione L'occasione Hitachi Energy, prodotti ad alta tensione, è rinomata in tutto il mondo come specialista per la trasmissione e la distribuzione di energia. L'unità di servizio è responsabile per il mondo dopo il supporto di vendita di sistemi generatore-rompatore (GCB) e commutatori isolati a gas (GIS), tra cui formazione, installazione e messa in servizio, manutenzione programmata, servizi di valore aggiunto, risoluzione dei problemi, estensioni, retrofit e sostituzioni. Come Acquirente Tecnico, si agisce come un'interfaccia chiave tra Procurement, Ingegneria, Qualità e la nostra rete di fornitori globale. Assicurarsi che materiali, componenti e servizi tecnicamente specificati siano chiaramente definiti, tecnicamente chiariti, qualificati e disponibili in linea con i requisiti di progetto, qualità e consegna. Attraverso una stretta collaborazione interfunzionale, traduci i requisiti di ingegneria in soluzioni di sourcing robuste e supporta la qualificazione dei fornitori e l'allineamento tecnico. Il vostro ruolo contribuisce direttamente alla qualità del prodotto, all'affidabilità e all'eccellenza operativa, consentendo a Hitachi Energy di fornire soluzioni energetiche innovative e sostenibili ai nostri clienti in tutto il mondo. Come farai ad avere un impatto - Eseguire chiarificazione tecnica di materiali, disegni, specifiche e modifiche ingegneristiche in stretta collaborazione con Ingegneria e fornitori - Supporta e coordina le attività del processo di approvazione della parte di produzione (PPAP), dei primi campioni e dei processi di qualificazione dei fornitori - Condurre valutazioni tecniche di materiali alternativi, richieste di deviazione e casi di obsolescenza - Collaborare a stretto contatto con gli acquirenti strategici e operativi su argomenti relativi ai fornitori e ai materiali - Sostenere il trattamento dei reclami dei fornitori, Rapporti di non conformità (NCR) e analisi delle cause root - Supporto e partecipazione a valutazioni dei fornitori e valutazioni dei fornitori tecnici, tra cui capacità, qualità e valutazioni di processo - Contribuire alle valutazioni delle prestazioni dei fornitori insieme a Qualità e Appalti Strategici - Assicurare accuratezza e completezza dei dati master di materiali e fornitori in SAP e fungere da punto di contatto tecnico durante le escalazioni dei fornitori - Support Service Organization e team di progetto in argomenti complessi o urgenti Il tuo sfondo - Formazione tecnica completa (ad es. polimeccanica, automazione tecnica, tecnica meccanica, ingegneria del design o simile) - 3-5 anni di esperienza nell'approvvigionamento tecnico o nei ruoli correlati a SCM - Forte comprensione dei disegni tecnici, Bill of Material e processi produttivi - Esperienza di lavoro con i fornitori su argomenti tecnici e di qualità - Stile di lavoro strutturato, orientato alla soluzione e comunicativo - Buone competenze tedesche e ottime competenze in inglese - Conoscenze SAP - Stile di lavoro proattivo, strutturato e orientato alla soluzione - Mindset orientato al team con una forte collaborazione interfunzionale Ulteriori informazioni su di noi - Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione The opportunity Hitachi Energy, High Voltage Products, is renowned worldwide as a specialist for power transmission and distribution. The Service unit is responsible for the worldwide after sales support of generator circuit-breaker (GCB) systems and gas insulated switchgears (GIS), including training, installation and commissioning, scheduled maintenance, added value services, troubleshooting, extensions, retrofits and replacements. As a Technical Buyer, you act as a key interface between Procurement, Engineering, Quality, and our global supplier network. You ensure that technically specified materials, components, and services are clearly defined, technically clarified, qualified, and available in line with project, quality, and delivery requirements. Through close cross‑functional collaboration, you translate engineering requirements into robust sourcing solutions and support supplier qualification and technical alignment. Your role contributes directly to product quality, supply reliability, and operational excellence, enabling Hitachi Energy to deliver innovative and sustainable energy solutions to our customers worldwide. ## How you'll make an impact - Perform technical clarification of materials, drawings, specifications, and engineering changes in close collaboration with Engineering and suppliers - Support and coordinate Production Part Approval Process (PPAP) activities, first samples, and supplier qualification processes - Conduct technical evaluations of alternative materials, deviation requests, and obsolescence cases - Collaborate closely with Strategic and Operational Buyers on supplier- and material-related topics - Support the handling of supplier complaints, Non‑Conformity Reports (NCRs), and root cause analyses - Support and participate in supplier assessments and technical supplier evaluations, including capability, quality, and process maturity reviews - Contribute to supplier performance evaluations together with Quality and Strategic Procurement - Ensure accuracy and completeness of material and supplier master data in SAP and act as the technical contact point during supplier escalations - Support Service Organization and Project Teams in complex or urgent procurement topics ## Your background - Completed technical education (e.g. Polymechanic, Automation Technician, Mechanical Technician, Design Engineer or similar) - 3-5 years experience in technical procurement or SCM‑related roles - Strong understanding of technical drawings, Bill of Material and manufacturing processes - Experience working with suppliers on technical and quality‑related topics - Structured, solution‑oriented, and communicative working style - Good German skills and very good English skills - SAP knowledge - Proactive, structured, and solution-focused working style - Team oriented mindset with strong cross-functional collaboration ## More about us - Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow
descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung Die Chance Hitachi Energy, High Voltage Products, ist weltweit als Spezialist für Stromübertragung und -verteilung bekannt. Die Service-Einheit ist für die weltweite nach dem Vertrieb von Generator-Schalter (GCB)-Systemen und gasisolierten Schaltanlagen (GIS) verantwortlich, einschließlich Schulung, Installation und Inbetriebnahme, geplante Wartung, Mehrwertdienste, Fehlersuche, Erweiterungen, Nachrüstungen und Ersatz. Als Technischer Käufer fungieren Sie als zentrale Schnittstelle zwischen Beschaffung, Engineering, Qualität und unserem weltweiten Lieferantennetzwerk. Sie stellen sicher, dass technisch spezifizierte Materialien, Komponenten und Dienstleistungen klar definiert, technisch geklärt, qualifiziert und gemäß Projekt-, Qualitäts- und Lieferanforderungen verfügbar sind. Durch eine enge funktionsübergreifende Zusammenarbeit übersetzen Sie technische
• Anforderungen in robuste Beschaffungslösungen und unterstützen die Lieferantenqualifikation und technische Ausrichtung. Ihre Rolle trägt direkt zur Produktqualität, Lieferzuverlässigkeit und operativer Exzellenz bei und ermöglicht es Hitachi Energy, unseren Kunden weltweit innovative und nachhaltige Energielösungen zu liefern. Wie Sie einen Einfluss haben - technische Klärung von Materialien, Zeichnungen, Spezifikationen und technischen Veränderungen in enger Zusammenarbeit mit Ingenieur und Lieferanten durchführen - Unterstützung und Koordination Produktion Teilgenehmigungsprozess (PPAP) Aktivitäten, erste Proben und Lieferantenqualifikationsverfahren - Durchführung technischer Bewertungen von alternativen Materialien, Abweichungen und obsoleszenz Fällen - enge Zusammenarbeit mit Strategischen und operativen Käufern zu liefer- und materialbezogenen Themen - Unterstützung der Behandlung von Lieferantenbeschwerden, Non‐Conformity Reports (NCRs) und Wurzelursachenanalysen - Unterstützung und Teilnahme an Lieferantenbewertungen und technischen Lieferantenbewertungen, einschließlich Kapazität, Qualität und Prozessreife Bewertungen - Tragen Sie zusammen mit Qualitäts- und Strategische Beschaffung auf Leistungsbewertungen von Lieferanten bei - Sicherstellung der Genauigkeit und Vollständigkeit von Material- und Lieferantenstammdaten in SAP und fungieren als technischer Kontaktpunkt während der Lieferanten Eskalationen - Support Service Organisation und Projektteams in komplexen oder dringenden Beschaffungsthemen Ihr Hintergrund - Abgeschlossene technische Ausbildung (z.B. Polymechaniker, Automatisierungstechniker, Mechanischer Techniker, Designingenieur oder dergleichen) - 3-5 Jahre Erfahrung in der technischen Beschaffung oder SCM-bezogenen Rollen - Starkes Verständnis von technischen Zeichnungen, Bill of Material und Fertigungsverfahren - Erleben Sie die Zusammenarbeit mit Lieferanten zu technischen und qualitätsbezogenen Themen - Strukturierter, lösungsorientierter und kommunikativer Arbeitsstil - Gute deutsche Fähigkeiten und sehr gute Englischkenntnisse - SAP Wissen - Proaktiver, strukturierter und lösungsorientierter Arbeitsstil - Teamorientierter Mindset mit starker funktionsübergreifender Zusammenarbeit Mehr über uns - Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen dabei, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistung zu optimieren und eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione L'opportunité Hitachi Energy, produits haute tension, est reconnue dans le monde entier comme un spécialiste de la transmission et de la distribution de puissance. L'unité de service est responsable de l'appui après vente dans le monde entier des systèmes de disjoncteurs de générateurs (GCB) et des commutateurs isolés de gaz (GIS), y compris la formation, l'installation et la mise en service, l'entretien programmé, les services à valeur ajoutée, le dépannage, les extensions, les mises à niveau et les remplacements. En tant qu'acheteur technique, vous agissez comme une interface clé entre l'approvisionnement, l'ingénierie, la qualité et notre réseau mondial de fournisseurs. Vous veillez à ce que les matériaux, composants et services techniquement spécifiés soient clairement définis, clarifiés techniquement, qualifiés et disponibles conformément aux exigences du projet, de la qualité et de la livraison. Grâce à une collaboration interfonctionnelle étroite, vous traduisez les exigences d'ingénierie en solutions d'approvisionnement robustes et soutenez la qualification du fournisseur et l'alignement technique. Votre rôle contribue directement à la qualité des produits, à la fiabilité de l'offre et à l'excellence opérationnelle, permettant à Hitachi Energy de proposer des solutions énergétiques innovantes et durables à nos clients dans le monde entier. Comment vous ferez un impact - Effectuer une clarification technique des matériaux, des dessins, des spécifications et des changements d'ingénierie en étroite collaboration avec l'ingénierie et les fournisseurs - Appuyer et coordonner les activités, les premiers échantillons et les processus de qualification des fournisseurs du processus d'approbation des parties de production (PPAP) - Effectuer des évaluations techniques des matériaux de remplacement, des demandes d'écart et des cas d'obsolescence - Collaborer étroitement avec les acheteurs stratégiques et opérationnels sur des sujets liés aux fournisseurs et au matériel - Appuyer le traitement des plaintes des fournisseurs, les rapports de non-conformité (RCN) et les analyses des causes profondes - Appuyer et participer aux évaluations des fournisseurs et aux évaluations techniques des fournisseurs, y compris les examens des capacités, de la qualité et de la maturité des processus - Contribuer aux évaluations du rendement des fournisseurs ainsi qu'aux achats stratégiques et de qualité - Assurer l'exactitude et l'exhaustivité des données de base du matériel et du fournisseur dans SAP et agir comme point de contact technique pendant les escalades du fournisseur - Organisations de services d ' appui et équipes de projet dans des domaines complexes ou urgents Vos antécédents - Formation technique terminée (p. ex. polymécanique, technicien en automatisation, technicien en mécanique, ingénieur en conception ou similaire) - 3-5 ans d'expérience dans l'approvisionnement technique ou les rôles liés au MSC - Forte compréhension des dessins techniques, du cahier des charges et des procédés de fabrication - Expérience de travail avec les fournisseurs sur des sujets techniques et liés à la qualité - Style de travail structuré, orienté vers la solution et communicatif - Bonnes compétences en allemand et très bonnes compétences en anglais - Connaissances SAP - Style de travail proactif, structuré et axé sur les solutions - L'esprit d'équipe avec une forte collaboration interfonctionnelle Plus sur nous - Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir

jobs.title: Global Product Specialist – Solid-State Transformers (SSTs) 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Solid-State Transformers (SSTs) are emerging as critical infrastructure for modern data centers, particularly AI facilities, by providing high efficiency (up to 98.5%), compact, and intelligent power management. Unlike conventional transformers, SSTs utilize power electronics to convert medium-voltage grid power directly to 800V DC, significantly reducing footprint, increasing efficiency, and easing grid interconnection. Join us as a Global Product Specialist – Solid-State Transformers (SSTs) and play a pivotal role in shaping the future of data center supply infrastructure, guiding both Hitachi Energy and clients toward smarter, greener, and more resilient operations. If you combine a solid understanding of relevant technologies with insight into customer value drivers—and can translate customer needs into actionable requirements that keep our solutions both innovative and aligned with client expectations—then this role is an excellent fit for you. How you´ll make an impact Conduct market evaluations, competitor analyses, and identify gaps in product, solutions, and services, while assessing Hitachi Energy's positioning Gather and analyze global standards, market requirements, customer needs, and values to contribute to the product roadmap Support the Global Product Manager in creating business cases for product, solutions, and service development projects Support global and local marketing teams in creating market communication materials, including assistance with new product launches Provide sales support, participate in customer meetings, and attend trade shows as required, ensuring the availability of appropriate training materials for internal and external use Drive technical solutions across Hitachi Energy's global footprint, following an annual cycle of activities to govern Global Product Management Your background Bachelor's degree in engineering, along with 10+ years of related experience preferred Prior experience in Product Management or Product Ownership within data centre domain, and knowledge of Solid-State Transformer (SST) technology Possess a technical mindset to serve as a technical expert, instilling customer confidence in the product and contributing to product design Ability to simplify and present the value proposition of a complex offering Strong expertise in qualitative and quantitative business analysis Proficient in analyzing market potential through product segmentation, go-to-market channels, and developing business cases. Willingness to travel domestically and internationally (20%) More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
